highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus:

faqs.question: Does Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus has good and experienced faculty?
faqs.answer: Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus has a Faculty review rating of 3.85 by students. This represents that Institute has decent, qualified and experienced faculty members.

faqs.question: Does Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus has good and experienced faculty?
faqs.answer: Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus has been rated 3.8 for faculty as per reviews by students. This represents that Institute has decent, qualified and experienced faculty members.

faqs.question: Is Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus a good college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus is a reputed institute for BCA, MBA/PGDM, B.Voc, After 1th Diploma, UG Diploma, M.Pharma, B.Tech, MCA, M.E./M.Tech, MBBS, MD, MS, D.Pharma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Animation, Teaching & Education, Medicine & Health Sciences, Architecture & Planning, Design, Mass Communication & Media, Engineering. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus has a review rating of 3.5 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.7 on campuslife, 3.3 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 3.6 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus?
faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus is approximately INR 116720 - INR 2550000.

placements.overview:
UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 991 students were admitted at Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus and 867 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 867 students 636 were placed with median salary of INR 450000 and 181 students opted for higher studies. A total of 931 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campusand 920 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 920 students 567 were placed with median salary of INR 445000 and 141 students opted for higher studies.

PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 296 students were admitted at Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus and 283 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 283 students 164 were placed with median salary of INR 460000 and 9 students opted for higher studies. A total of 263 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campusand 244 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 244 students 130 were placed with median salary of INR 354000 and 9 students opted for higher studies.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus provides Full Time and Part Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies, and have a fee structure of around INR 1,10,300 to 25,50,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and B.Pharma. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated BCA+ MCA - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good college which has all good quality which is required for any graduation course.

review_content.Placements: Minimum and average students are placed in my course. Students who pursue different subjects like bio, commerce, and arts are also placed in the same way. The highest package offered is 8.5 LPA, and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. Top recruitment is there in Reliance, Nilon, and many others.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are computer labs, science labs, and a library for various experiments and educational purposes. Medical facilities are also provided at Shankaracharya Hospital. Sports and playgrounds are also good. A canteen is provided for lunch. Students who are interested in sports can play wherever they want.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is decent, with supportive faculty and departments. It is value for money.

review_content.Placements: There are placements, but they are not up to the mark when compared to the total number of students graduated. Faculty members promise 100 percent placement when you take admission into this college, but providing placement to even 200 graduates out of 1000 cannot be called 100% placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are decent. There is a separate hostel for freshers and another for seniors, so there is no ragging in this college. You share a room with 2-3 people in the first year, and from the second year, 2 people occupy one room. However, most students shift outside the campus to PGs, flats, etc., after the first year.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: This college is good for engineering.

review_content.Placements: I am Yash Chandra, studying in SSTC, doing B.Tech in CSE (AIML). I chose this subject because of AI development in the future. The average package was 4 LPA in several companies like Amazon, Microsoft, etc., which is good. You can choose this college for a better future with government jobs if you top this university.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are good. There is good availability of Wi-Fi, cleanliness of rooms, the mess food is okay, and the hostel is also good. There are also medical facilities available in our hostel as well as in college, and indoor game equipment is also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure is good. Placements are basic. Academic and cultural is way better .

review_content.Placements: I am in the 3rd year of college Our seniors get placed this year Basically the percentage of placement in our college is about 60% because most of the students go for GATE exam &startups. The placements are quite normal with a basic package it depends on your skills that how much you are getting paid. The highest package is something around 10 LPA and the lowest is not fixed but a roughly figure is 3LPA. Companies that visit in IT and CS branches for the placement are TCS mostly and sometimes there is google and other multinational companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our infrastructure is quite basic, classroom are average and library is very nice with Wi-Fi facility. Our technical labs are good and have nice internet connection. Overall our infrastructure is quite good and advance. Medical and sports facilities are quite good in our college because our college has ha medical branch also near our campus. Hostal food is good in boys hostal but basic in girls hostel I will prefer for tiffin service for a better health. Our canteen is good for having snacks and lunch good environment and pockets friendly.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I will not recommend this college as it is now overcrowded for B.Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 10-20% students are placed through campus drives. Salary packages range from 2 LPA to 5 LPA. Top recruiter is 3M. Around 50% of students get internships in pharma companies for roles such as sales, production, QA, and research. It has scope for more companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious, but mostly simple seating, like benches/desks. It also equipped with blackboards/whiteboards, sometimes a projector. Basic ventilation and fans, and AC are limited to seminar halls only. There are different labs for different subjects. There is one life really sufficient for B.Pharmacy. Students have no access to Wi-Fi. I haven't lived in hostel but I have listened to different students who say that hostel food is the worst. There is no specific sports and games period, we only get to play when there is a festival or different pharmacy days.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is perfect for good placements and other cultures.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students were placed in our course. 2-3 LPA was the highest, and I don't know about the lowest average package offered. In our college, placement plays an important role in shaping our lifestyle as it serves as a bridge between academic learning and professional opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course and the department include free Wi-Fi in all corridors, clean and perfect labs with all types of instruments and glassware, spacious classrooms for lectures and other tests, and a library for reading and books.

admission_process.title: Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus admission 2025 is merit-based. To apply for the programmes offered, students need to clear the preset admission criteria. At Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus, students can pursue wide range of programmes in fields, such as Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Design, Mass Communication and Media, Architecture and Planning, Science, Teaching and Education and Animation.

Some of the popular Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus programmes are BCA and UG Diploma, etc at UG level and MBA/PGDM and MCA at PG level. These programmes are offered in full time mode. See below the key highlights for Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus admissions:

description: Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 164055 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus MBBS cutoff 2025 was 164055 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 549227 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

CG PET cutoff 2025 is finally out for students seeking admission to various undergraduate engineering courses in the state of Chhattisgarh. Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus has also released the second round cutoff list for aspiring candidates, based on JEE Main scores and CG PET counselling. The minimum cutoff for admission to any branch was 2631, for candidates belonging to the General HS category. The maximum required cutoff rank is 3569 during Round 2 admission.

This year, in 2025, the cutoff rank for admission to MBBS was 2506 for the General AI category students._x000D_ On the other hand, for the OBC category candidates, the Round 2 cutoff rank for the same course stood at 2255, suggesting that the competition for the General AI category is lower as compared to the OBC category. To view the cutoff details category-wise and round-wise for 2025, 2024, and 2023, use the provided filters.

hostel_campus.college_name: Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus Infrastructure Details & Reviews

library.description: The Library has the collection of 63039 books, CDs, newspapers, print & electronic journals, magazines; both national as well as international. The library is an institutional member of DELNET, and IRC (American Information Resource Centre, Mumbai).

The Library has the collection of 63039 books, CDs, newspapers, print & electronic journals, magazines; both national as well as international. The library is an institutional member of DELNET, and IRC (American Information Resource Centre, Mumbai).

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Microwave Lab, Communication Lab, CAD-CAM Lab, R&D Lab, HMT Lab, RAC Lab, ECS Lab, Network Analysis Lab

reviews.review_heading: Good college which has all good quality which is required for any graduation course.
reviews.review_text: There are computer labs, science labs, and a library for various experiments and educational purposes. Medical facilities are also provided at Shankaracharya Hospital. Sports and playgrounds are also good. A canteen is provided for lunch. Students who are interested in sports can play wherever they want.

reviews.review_heading: The college is decent, with supportive faculty and departments. It is value for money.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are decent. There is a separate hostel for freshers and another for seniors, so there is no ragging in this college. You share a room with 2-3 people in the first year, and from the second year, 2 people occupy one room. However, most students shift outside the campus to PGs, flats, etc., after the first year.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for engineering.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good. There is good availability of Wi-Fi, cleanliness of rooms, the mess food is okay, and the hostel is also good. There are also medical facilities available in our hostel as well as in college, and indoor game equipment is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good. Placements are basic. Academic and cultural is way better .
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is quite basic, classroom are average and library is very nice with Wi-Fi facility. Our technical labs are good and have nice internet connection. Overall our infrastructure is quite good and advance. Medical and sports facilities are quite good in our college because our college has ha medical branch also near our campus. Hostal food is good in boys hostal but basic in girls hostel I will prefer for tiffin service for a better health. Our canteen is good for having snacks and...

reviews.review_heading: I will not recommend this college as it is now overcrowded for B.Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious, but mostly simple seating, like benches/desks. It also equipped with blackboards/whiteboards, sometimes a projector. Basic ventilation and fans, and AC are limited to seminar halls only. There are different labs for different subjects. There is one life really sufficient for B.Pharmacy. Students have no access to Wi-Fi. I haven't lived in hostel but I have listened to different students who say that hostel food is the worst. There is no specific sports and games period, ...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is perfect for good placements and other cultures.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course and the department include free Wi-Fi in all corridors, clean and perfect labs with all types of instruments and glassware, spacious classrooms for lectures and other tests, and a library for reading and books.

reviews.review_heading: It's an amazing experience at this college, as well as the faculty and other activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided by our college for the B. Pharmacy course is quite satisfactory support for academic and practical learning. The classrooms are spacious. Well, it has equipment with projectors for digital teaching. Laboratories are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: In short my college is quite average with very good placements and average facilities, satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite average. Not that much good. Wi-Fi is slow. Labs are good. Classrooms in my opinion are not that good. Library is also average. Hostel facility is average and their mess is okay. College canteen is quite good. Also, the campus has extra fast food and juice shops, includes stationery. Sports teams also have been in competition with other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: I'm somewhat dissatisfied because of mediocre teachers, with a low-quality hostel and mess.
reviews.review_text: There are not so good facilities and infrastructure available in this college. There is Wi-Fi on campus, which is decent. The labs have equipment, but some of them don't work. Some computers don't have operating systems, while others may lack keyboard or mouse. Classrooms have dirty benches. The library is decent and has ample books relevant to the course. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is terrible, and it smells a lot in the corridors. The food quality of mess is barely edible, but...

reviews.review_heading: Decent faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, including hostels and laboratories. SSTC provides well-equipped labs for various departments and classrooms are very great. College has a huge library which has massive books collections. They have great hostel and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Dents to come to the college .
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good and big enough to accommodate all the students. Wi-Fi is available in the college and the library is good, clean and has Wi-Fi. The classrooms are good and are cleaned every day. There are labs for chemistry, physics and computers as well as a workshop.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but not that good because of faculty members and there are no good placements.
reviews.review_text:
1. There is a big library where all the subject books are, and students can read there.
2. In the hostel, there are 2-, 3-, and 4-seater rooms where students can take rooms of their choice. The quality of food is not that of food in the mess and the mess is also not that hygienic. Plates are not washed properly. Food is provided for 3 durations: one is in the morning, that is breakfast, the second is lunch, and the third is dinner at night. No milk is given to any student.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for having a good college life that gives you a good experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The administration building is not so good, and the hostel is not that great. The classroom blocks are average. Overall, the college is not bad, but it could be better. Tthe rooms don't have air conditioning, which makes it difficult to attend classes in the summer, especially in the hot weather of Bhilai.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average at best the facilities it provides can be better.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities in infrastructure of the college is very good and can accommodate very large amount of students but the infrastructure is old and is not much maintained. Labs and classrooms are good and can accommodate up to 50 students 
The quality of hostel is not that good considered that the infrastructure is old it needs to be cleaned and maintained canteen is a mess the food quality is very poor and sports and games are not that much played.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college but could be better.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi available for students. There are various labs including Computer network lab, Internet of Things lab, Database Management System labs, Operating System lab, and Android lab to name a few. The facilities available are terrible. Food is terrible and not edible.

college_info.college_name: Santosh Dental College and Hospital, Santosh University

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for Santosh Dental College and Hospital, Santosh University admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty members and teaching.

review_content.Placements: As the college is from medical and dental roots, there is no campus selection or campus recruitment. The opportunities after completing the course are fully based on individual experience and knowledge. The college will provide the necessary education and practice for the future.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college consists of all requirements for budding doctors such as pre-clinical labs, clinical labs, library, Wi-Fi, etc. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. The condition of the hostel is not up to the mark and the college mess also comes under the average scale.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college and I am satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: About 60% of students from our college are placed in well-known health centers. The highest salary package of 1 LPA is offered for the beginner after master's. Max Apollo is a well-known health center that recruits students. About 65% of students got internships at the same.
review_content.Infrastructure: Right now, our college is in making. The maximum part got completed like the dental side of the university is complete. A big mess is there on campus for dinner, lunch, and breakfast. Labs are well-maintained and the classrooms are in good condition. A vast ground is available for playing.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty. Bad infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Passed out students generally open their own clinic or they work in hospitals. There are no placement done in dental college. Students have to find a job by its own or they can prepare for their PG entrance exam. During internship period this is very hard to get patient in this college so students have enough time to prepare for PG entrance.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are no Wi-Fi facilities, classrooms are not so good, even air conditioners are installed bt they doesn't work. Overall in terms of infrastructure, condition is not so good, sometimes even water cooler doesn't work. We have been provided a badminton court only and there is no other sports. Mess food is unhygienic and tasteless.

review_summary.college_name: Santosh Dental College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college overall but lots of politics in college as teachers can do whatever they want.

content.Placements: As I’m doing BDS and right now, I do not know much about the placement. Usually, most of us have planned to get into our master’s degree MS. Almost all of us have to do the internship from the same college that is Santosh Medical College. We get around a 4k stipend which depends upon the attendance and overall performance.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not that good. ACs are not available, or they don't work. Libraries are well-built. Faculty is good. They provide hostel for UG and PG students. Mess food is also provided. Sports events take place in our college in which students can participate.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A budget friendly dental college .

content.Placements: Our 5th year is a compulsory internship year that we need to complete in our college only. We have our own dental hospital where patient flow is good. We also receive a stipend of 5000 every month for the internship. We have all the departments for internship and PG courses as well: Periodontology, Pedodontology, Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, Conservative and Endodontics, Prosthodontics, and Public Health Dentistry.
content.Infrastructure: Still under construction, some parts are still being constructed and it's really a headache sometimes. The AC sometimes doesn't work properly, and there are frequent power cuts in this area, which can make it unbearable to even sit in class. In summers, the conditions are worse. Also, sometimes water supply stops working. Washrooms can be unhygienic and are sometimes not properly maintained. Additionally, they are insufficient in number proportionate to the number of students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty members and teaching.

content.Placements: As the college is from medical and dental roots, there is no campus selection or campus recruitment. The opportunities after completing the course are fully based on individual experience and knowledge. The college will provide the necessary education and practice for the future.
content.Infrastructure: The college consists of all requirements for budding doctors such as pre-clinical labs, clinical labs, library, Wi-Fi, etc. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. The condition of the hostel is not up to the mark and the college mess also comes under the average scale.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college and I am satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: About 60% of students from our college are placed in well-known health centers. The highest salary package of 1 LPA is offered for the beginner after master's. Max Apollo is a well-known health center that recruits students. About 65% of students got internships at the same.
content.Infrastructure: Right now, our college is in making. The maximum part got completed like the dental side of the university is complete. A big mess is there on campus for dinner, lunch, and breakfast. Labs are well-maintained and the classrooms are in good condition. A vast ground is available for playing.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty. Bad infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Passed out students generally open their own clinic or they work in hospitals. There are no placement done in dental college. Students have to find a job by its own or they can prepare for their PG entrance exam. During internship period this is very hard to get patient in this college so students have enough time to prepare for PG entrance.
content.Infrastructure: There are no Wi-Fi facilities, classrooms are not so good, even air conditioners are installed bt they doesn't work. Overall in terms of infrastructure, condition is not so good, sometimes even water cooler doesn't work. We have been provided a badminton court only and there is no other sports. Mess food is unhygienic and tasteless.

faqs.answer: A:    Hi-Tech Medical College and Hospital, Bhubaneswar is a well-known institution for MD, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Hi-Tech Medical College and Hospital, Bhubaneswar has course specializations in Anaesthesia, Biochemistry, Microbiology, Pediatrics, Pathology, Pharmacology, Physiology, Community Medicine, Anatomy, Dermatology, General Medicine, Psychiatry, Radiology, Pulmonary Medicine, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Ophthalmology, ENT, General Surgery, Orthopaedics.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Hi-Tech Medical College and Hospital, Bhubaneswar?

review_content.General: There are 5 lecture theatres (LT) with a seating capacity of 180 students. There is a central library equipped with free Wi-Fi connection. The library is study-friendly, equipped with a wide array of books from different foreign authors and published magazines. It is kept neat and clean, which makes it more adorable. The mess food is miserable. One has to sacrifice both taste and quality they serve. Hostel rooms are 3-seaters, but it is cozy with minimum ventilation and less floor space.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Hi-Tech Medical College and Hospital, Bhubaneswar.

review_content.Placements: We don't have placements in our medical college. After completing the final year, every student is supposed to work as an intern in the hospital attached to our college. It's almost like a paid internship. We get a monthly salary of Rs.12,000 to Rs.15,000. Interns are placed across different wards in rotation. It ensures the necessary clinical exposure. The clinical exposure at our college is pretty decent. As the hospital welcomes and treats a lot of people from every socioeconomic status, it ensures a lot of patient-doctor interaction.
review_content.Infrastructure: I believe that the infrastructure of the college needs a lot of development. Construction work at campus never ends. Campus is not really big and we face some difficulty in finding our daily goods easily. We can have a vehicle for that purpose and it will make things easier. Laboratories are not equipped with adequate advanced instruments. A lot of practical topics remain up to theory only. Library facilities are really good, and that's the only nice part of our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The campus is known for its lush greenery and serene environment.

review_content.Placements: The first thing about this college is that it is located on a very beautiful campus. The college is best for dentistry and very strict. Patient flow is very nice. As your going to be a doctor, this college teaches ethics and how to be a perfect doctor. 100 percent placements are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: This is the main reason I took admission here. Our college campus environment is quite impressive because there is a lot of greenery with trees and flowers everywhere, and also the campus is very clean. Faculty members are skilled in their respective subjects, friendly, and very helpful. Personally, I like my English teacher, Karan sir. This college is still under development, so new buildings are being made. Classrooms are very spacious with CCTV cameras equipped. Some negative points are that our college is far from the city area. Our college doesn't have a gym and no proper canteen. Our college is in a rural area.

overview_faqs.answer: Hi-Tech Medical College and Hospital, Bhubaneswar is a well-known institution for MBBS, MD, MS courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Hi-Tech Medical College and Hospital, Bhubaneswar has a rating of 2.7 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.8 on campuslife, 2.5 on placements, 2.9 on faculty and 2.1 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Hi-Tech Medical College and Hospital, Bhubaneswar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Excellent place for medical academics.

content.Placements: They can get placed as a medical officer at a private hospital. Depending on your NEET PG rank you can pursue MD. They can also enter research and genetic counselling jobs at pharma companies. The initial salary is around Rs. 40,000 per month. Depending on clinical skills and knowledge. The salary may be hiked further. During internships in the college, the stipend provided is Rs. 15,000.
content.Infrastructure: The library is world-class. It is centrally air-conditioned and has ample books. There is a study room in the library. It is also world-class. Classrooms are large and equipped with smart boards and central air conditioners. Hostels are excellent. They provide discipline for educational pursuits. We also have a strict anti-ragging policy.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Anwesha: Journey of Life to Hi-Knowledge

content.Placements: There are a total of 150 students in every batch. Our MBBS course is of 4.5 years and 1 year of internship/house surgeonship. In 1st year: anatomy, physiology, and biochemistry. In 2nd year: pathology, pharmacology, and microbiology. In 3rd year: community medicine and forensic medicine. In final year: general medicine, surgery, OBG, pediatrics, psychiatry, otorhinolaryngology, ophthalmology, radiology, dermatology, and orthopedics.
content.Infrastructure: There are 5 lecture theatres (LT) with a seating capacity of 180 students. There is a central library equipped with free Wi-Fi connection. The library is study-friendly, equipped with a wide array of books from different foreign authors and published magazines. It is kept neat and clean, which makes it more adorable. The mess food is miserable. One has to sacrifice both taste and quality they serve. Hostel rooms are 3-seaters, but it is cozy with minimum ventilation and less floor space.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Hi-Tech Medical College and Hospital, Bhubaneswar.

content.Placements: We don't have placements in our medical college. After completing the final year, every student is supposed to work as an intern in the hospital attached to our college. It's almost like a paid internship. We get a monthly salary of Rs.12,000 to Rs.15,000. Interns are placed across different wards in rotation. It ensures the necessary clinical exposure. The clinical exposure at our college is pretty decent. As the hospital welcomes and treats a lot of people from every socioeconomic status, it ensures a lot of patient-doctor interaction.
content.Infrastructure: I believe that the infrastructure of the college needs a lot of development. Construction work at campus never ends. Campus is not really big and we face some difficulty in finding our daily goods easily. We can have a vehicle for that purpose and it will make things easier. Laboratories are not equipped with adequate advanced instruments. A lot of practical topics remain up to theory only. Library facilities are really good, and that's the only nice part of our college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The campus is known for its lush greenery and serene environment.

content.Placements: The first thing about this college is that it is located on a very beautiful campus. The college is best for dentistry and very strict. Patient flow is very nice. As your going to be a doctor, this college teaches ethics and how to be a perfect doctor. 100 percent placements are offered.
content.Infrastructure: This is the main reason I took admission here. Our college campus environment is quite impressive because there is a lot of greenery with trees and flowers everywhere, and also the campus is very clean. Faculty members are skilled in their respective subjects, friendly, and very helpful. Personally, I like my English teacher, Karan sir. This college is still under development, so new buildings are being made. Classrooms are very spacious with CCTV cameras equipped. Some negative points are that our college is far from the city area. Our college doesn't have a gym and no proper canteen. Our college is in a rural area.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Hi-Tech Medical College and hospital.

content.Placements: MBBS course is of 5 years now (new guidelines). In 5th year, we have a mandatory internship programme after which we get our MBBS degree Certificate. Placement is not there. We have to clear NEET PG exam to grab MD/MS course.
content.Infrastructure: Rooms are spacious with digital boards. Our library is big and is provided with AC and free Wi-Fi. Faculty members are also good and supportive. Hostel and canteen food is below average. Medical facilities are good. Medical students get free consultation from doctors when sick without any charges.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences and Research offers MBBS, BSc, MS, MD, PhD, etc. at UG, PG and Doctoral levels. HIMSR admission/ admission process is entrance-based. The Institute grants admission to the MBBS programme through National Eligibility Cum Entrance Test (NEET-UG), an entrance exam held by National Testing Agency (NTA).

faqs.answer: A:    The NEET UG results are accepted by the Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences and Research, New Delhi, for admission to the MBBS programme. To be considered for admission to HIMSR's MBBS program, candidates must take the NEET UG test, which is administered by the NTA. Applicants must register for NEET UG Counseling if they meet the minimum NEET percentile requirements. Applicants must register online by going to the Medical Counselling Committee (MCC)'s official website. Candidates must provide all required information, including their academic and personal data. Candidates are required to lock down their choices of college and course. Candidates must show up at the designated college with the required paperwork in order for it to be verified. Candidates must pay the admission fee to confirm their admission following the verification process.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences accept for admission to MBBS?

review_summary.college_name: Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences And Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a cute college with nice studies.

content.Placements: Placements depend on marks scored in NEET PG. We had alumni from our college who went to AIIMS as well, and many other reputed colleges. Many have also cleared exams like the USMLE and PLAB. It basically depends on students how well they have studied. HIMSR is considered one of the top private colleges and indeed has a good name.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are not that great. Food is also okay, not very good, and not very bad either. Hostels are clean. College has an AC lecture theatre, library, and computer labs. Washrooms are nice. The college is overall not very big, but it has a cozy vibe.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences And Research, New Delhi.

content.Placements: In MBBS there is nothing like campus placements. We have to complete this course in 4.5 years, and mandatory internships are provided for 1 year to get placed in any hospital or medical college. Civil services or some post-graduation courses like MD and MS are also offered in our college.
content.Infrastructure: All required books are available in the central library. There is also a separate library for different courses. Sports and extracurricular activities are encouraged, and we also have a dedicated sports week. Projector is used for theory classes, and there are separate practical classes for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college was established in 2012 and has been ranked 22 by NIRF.

content.Placements: Each batch contains 100 students and now from 2021 the seats have been increased by 50. so there's a good number of candidates. Hospital infrastructure is also good. From the second year onwards, there are clinical postings for MBBS students so that they are exposed to hospital settings earlier rather than just in an internship.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are big and spacious. Hostel facilities can be a handful sometimes but we manage somehow. Wi-Fi is good. There are canteens, their food is good too. The campus is clean and nice. We hold various co-curricular activities as well like sports tournaments.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the good colleges.

content.Placements: Almost 99% of the students from our course got placed at different places. There are mostly no recruiting companies, but students have to go to prestigious organisations on their own to apply for jobs. The highest salary package was offered to a graduate, which can be around 18 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel is good with proper facilities for everything. There is Wi-Fi, and the library and labs are equipped with proper instruments and tools. Almost all the books needed for the course are available. The quality of food available in the mess is good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best MBBS college with low marks.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered to the students is 2 LPA. The average salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. Graduate students have also glorified the name of our college by getting PG seats in institutes like AIIMS, MAMC, and PGIMER. Some students also got selected into top courses like Radiology, Cardiology, Neurology, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good infrastructure. It has fully equipped labs, a dissection hall, demo rooms, a library, etc. It has a proper sports complex for games like basketball, volleyball, badminton, billiards, etc. It has the best cricket ground as compared to any medical college in Delhi. The campus has a Wi-Fi facility. The canteens are available to have food while studying. The mess also serves bad food. The food served is a bit oily and spicy. Fruits are never served in a mess, and salad should be served daily.

admission_overview.title: HIMSR Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences & Research (HIMSR), New Delhi admission 2026 will open soon for all programmes. HIMSR offers admission into a number of medical programmes in the domains of health and life science. The institute also offers quality healthcare at an affordable cost with a 470-bed Hakeem Abdul Hameed Centenary Hospital. Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences & Research (HIMSR) offers courses at the UG and PG levels. These courses are offered in a full-time and offline mode, the admission process of which is entrance based . The institute offers over five programmes with different specialisations to choose from. Applications are accepted strictly in the online mode through the official HIMSR website. Some popular programmes offered at the college include MBBA and MD. Read the article to know more about Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences & Research (HIMSR), New Delhi admission 2026.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences accept for admission to MBBS?
faqs.answer: The NEET UG results are accepted by the Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences and Research, New Delhi, for admission to the MBBS programme. To be considered for admission to HIMSR's MBBS program, candidates must take the NEET UG test, which is administered by the NTA. Applicants must register for NEET UG Counseling if they meet the minimum NEET percentile requirements. Applicants must register online by going to the Medical Counselling Committee (MCC)'s official website. Candidates must provide all required information, including their academic and personal data. Candidates are required to lock down their choices of college and course. Candidates must show up at the designated college with the required paperwork in order for it to be verified. Candidates must pay the admission fee to confirm their admission following the verification process.

description: Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

NEET UG is the accepted exam for candidates seeking admission to the MBBS courses at Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences And Research, New Delhi. For 2025, the NEET UG cutoff is yet to be released. However, aspirants can refer to the table below to view the Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences NEET UG cutoff 2024 for general AI category students to estimate the upcoming cutoff ranks.

Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences MBBS cutoff 2024 was released for different categories of students in the AI quota. For General AI category students, the last round 2024 NEET UG cutoff rank for the MBBS course was 23802. In 2023 and 2022, the cutoff ranks were recorded at 59571 and 27485, respectively, for the same course.

Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences accepts NEET UG scores for admission to the MBBS course. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the important NEET UG dates for admission to Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences And Research, New Delhi.

Candidates seeking admission to Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences And Research, New Delhi can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated year-wise NEET UG counselling rounds.

Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 37005 to 224921. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in General Medicine, followed by MD in Pharmacology and MD in Microbiology. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 37005, 197430 and 224921, respectively.

highlights.summary: JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research admissions 2026 are open for various UG and PG courses. Other recent updates are provided:

college_info.intro:
JSS Academy of Higher Education & Research offers UG, PG, diploma, certificate, and PhD courses across Pharmacy, Dentistry, Life Sciences, Management Studies, Yoga, and others. BSc, BPharma, and MSc are the flagship courses offered at JSS Mysore.
JSS University offers a full-time, three-year BSc programme at the UG level. The BSc programmes offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of Biotechnology, Microbiology, Psychology, Biochemistry, Microbiology, Psychology, Environmental Sciences, and others. The MSc programme offered by the JSS College Mysore is a two-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Medical Anatomy, Clinical Embryology, Medical Physiology, Echocardiography, Forensic Odontology, and others. The below-mentioned are JSS Academy of Higher Education & Research popular programmes:

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutical Analysis - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good college because of good working environment, good infrastructure, and good placement.

review_content.Placements: I have completed my course in 2023, 2021-2023 batch. In my course, 15 students were there in the P. Analysis branch, of which 08 students got placed. The highest package was offered by Baxter, which was 5.5 LPA and the lowest package offered was 3 LPA by Micro Lab.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good, and they provided sufficient equipment for our research work, like UV, IR, GC, HPLC, DSC, LC-MS, and NMR. All this equipment was sufficient for the research activities in pharmaceutical analysis, and we were free to use it.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: JSS Medical College. An excellent choice.

review_content.Placements: The internship and placement in our course are amazing, and our college provides many opportunities through connections with various hospitals. The internship experience is excellent and offers exposure to the real world. The top roles offered after our course include medicine, surgery, cardiology, radiology, dermatology, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is decent and labs are well-equipped with the latest technology for better student understanding. The hostel infrastructure is outstanding with multiple types of rooms available for students including both common and attached washroom options. There are Wi-Fi-enabled labs and a library on the college campus. The food facility in the hostel is decent. The medical facilities are available, and there is also a canteen on campus. Many sports facilities are provided for students.

individual_reviews.title: M.Pharm in Regulatory Affairs at JSS College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Macleods Pharmaceuticals, Intas Pharmaceuticals, and Apollo Pharmacies Limited were the leading organizations that hired M.Pharm graduates for the highest pay. A few other organizations, like Nigam Nutrimed and Ranks Medical, hired students for very low pay.
content.Infrastructure: The canteen portions were available with automatic services to satisfy our needs. In spite of this, manual services were also available in the canteen. The food available in the canteen was acceptable to eat most of the time. The instructions provided by the college were not adjusted according to our convenience. Whether we liked it or not, we had to follow them as they were.

individual_reviews.title: I will always recommend this college to upcoming students.

content.Placements: Our college provides good knowledge and placements. Placement opportunities are high after graduating from this college.

content.Faculty: Faculty members are so good, well-trained, and well-educated. They always have the capability to teach us and clear our doubts. Semester examinations are a little bit tough, but we can go through studies, and the faculty members will help us. The pass percentage is 40%.

admission_overview.college_name: JSS Academy of Higher Education & Research Admission 2025: Cutoff, Eligibility, Selection & Application Process

admission_process.title: JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The academy accepts national-level entrance exams such as NEET, NEET PG, NEET SS, etc. for admission to specific courses. Besides, the academy also conducts an entrance exam for UG and PG Pharmacy courses.JSS AHERoffers courses at UG, PG, diploma and doctoral levels through seven faculty and 15 departments/ colleges. The academy offers courses in multiple streams such as Medicine, Health Sciences, Pharmacy, Life Sciences, etc. Interested candidates can apply on the official website of the academy for admissions.
JSS Academy Mysore offers more than 100 full-time, online or distance learning courses. Candidates need to apply online for their preferred course. Below are the keyJSS Mysore admissionhighlights:
Particulars
JSS AHER Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Doctoral
UG courses:INR 45,000- INR 20.7 lakh
PG courses:INR 1.2 lakh - INR 69.4 lakh
How to apply?

JSS AHER MSc LS Brochure

Candidates need to qualify the entrance exam accepted for their programme or meet the merit requirements. Some of the accepted entrance exams are NEET UG, NEET PG, NEET SS, etc. Aspirants must check the eligibility criteria set for their course to fill out the application form. Below are popularJSS Mysore coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Bachelor’s degree of minimum 3 years duration with at least 50% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC)
Check out otherJSS AHER Courses

The total fee of JSS AHER is a sum of multiple components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, etc. Candidates need to pay tuition fees annually for the course. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the academy. Below are JSS AHER fee and average package for top courses:
INR 1.2 lakh - INR 3.6 lakh
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Candidates can get a seat in JSS AHER based on merit in the last qualifying exam or entrance test score. The seat intake varies course-wise. About 70% of seats for BBA, BSc, MBA, etc. are filled based on merit. Below are JSS AHER courses along with their intake:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

JSS AHER admission process begins with registration via online mode. Candidates must first apply for their preferred course followed by selection rounds. Below are the steps to get a seat in JSS Mysore:
STEP 1: JSS Mysore Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 to register for a course. Candidates also need to upload specified documents to complete the application process.
STEP 2: Selection

The applications are evaluated and shortlisted based on eligibility requirements in this step. JSS Mysore checks applicants' educational records for shortlisting. Students who meet the criteria are selected. The academy considers NEET UG for MBBS and BDS courses, NEET PG for MD and MS.

Once the provisional seat allotment is over, students can confirm their seats by paying course fees and submitting important documents. After fee payment, the admission process is completed and the candidate is informed about the class commencement.

faqs.answer: JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research offers two-year MBA programme spread across four semesters. Candidates need to complete a minimum of graduation to apply for MBA. The academy offers MBA in:Hospital AdministrationPharmacy AdministrationInformation Technology.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass bachelor’s degree of minimum three-years duration with at least 50% aggregate to apply for JSS Academy of Higher Education MBA. There is 10% relaxation in the aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC candidates. 70% of MBA seats are filled based on merit in the last qualifying exam. 15% seats are reserved for institutional preference. Hence, candidates must ensure they fulfil the eligibility criteria before applying for the course.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in JSS Mysore?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission in JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research must fulfil the eligibility and selection requirements. The selection criteria varies course-wise. Candidates consider merit in the last qualifying exam for BSc, MSc, BBA, etc. For courses such as MD, MBBS, BDS, etc., entrance exams are accepted. Hence, direct admission is not available in JSS Mysore.

faqs.question: Is JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research hard to get?
faqs.answer: Getting into JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research requires candidates to follow some steps. Candidates first need to fill out the application form on the official website of JSS for their preferred course. The level of difficulty will depend on the course selected by the aspirants. For programmes such as MBBS, BDS, MD, MDS, MS, etc., candidates will need to qualify entrance exam. If aspirants is applying for courses such as BBA, MBA, BSc, MSc, etc., their selection will be based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: Can I join the JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research without NEET?
faqs.answer: The answer to this question will completely depend on the course selected by the candidates. If the aspirants choses to pursue MBBS or BDS programme, then NEET UG will be required for admission. For all the other courses, aspirants can get admission without NEET-UG score. If a candidate wishes to take admission in MD or MS courses, they will need to qualify NEET-PG along with fulfiling the eligibility requirements.

faqs.question: How to get admission in JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research?
faqs.answer: JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The applications are evaluated and shortlisted based on eligibility requirements for the course. JSS Mysore checks educational records of the applicants for selection. Students who meet the criteria are selected. JSS Mysore considers NEET UG for MBBS and BDS courses, NEET PG for MD and MS.

placement_data.title: JSS Mysore Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per the NIRF report 2024 released by JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research, the median package offered during UG 3-year , UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 9.75 LPA , INR 9.8 LPA and INR 13.55 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 2-year , PG 3-year and PG 6-year placements 2023 stood at INR 10.75 LPA , INR 15.5 LPA and INR 11.65 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, the NIRF report 2023 is released. As per the report, 703 UG and 835 PG students were placed during JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research placements 2022. The median package offered to UG students ranged between INR 9.32 LPA and INR 11.12 LPA . For PG courses, the median package offered during JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research placement 2022 ranged between INR 10.08 LPA and INR 10.98 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: Is JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research good for placements?
faqs.answer: Jagadguru Sri Shivarathreeswara (JSS) Academy of Higher Education & Research, formerly Jagadguru Sri Shivarathreeswara University, is an institute of higher education focussed on medical and health-related studies in Mysore, Karnataka, India. yes, JSS Academy has been ranked at 72nd and 201st position by the Times of India & NIRF respectively which is quite good. Besides this, it also has been accredited by famous organizations AICTE & PCI. The college also provides decent placements with the highest salary package of 30 LPA to one of the students. there are quite good placement opportunities at the end of the graduation programme and also after the completion of the master's degree.

nirf.description:
JSS Mysore has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, JSS Mysore fell 2 ranks to #38 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, JSS Mysore climbed 3 ranks to #21 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: JSS Academy of Higher Education & Research Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Students have exclusive hostels for Boys and Girls with spacious, comfortable, well-furnished rooms with all modern amenities, hygienic kitchens, nutritious food, and portable RO water source is provided for drinking. Each hostel block has a separate pantry and laundry facility. Students wishing to stay in these hostels are advised to apply in the prescribed forms. The boarders are having Indoor and outdoor sports facilities and ample reading room facility. Round the clock security guards (Male and Female for respective hostels) as well as CCTV cameras are placed for continuous monitoring and vigilance for the safety of students.

library.description: All the libraries have ensured access to a very large number of computer stations and study spaces. All reading areas have Wi-Fi connectivity. The comprehensive collection comprises both traditional resources viz. books and journals in print and the electronic resources – the CD ROMs, videos, slides, e-books, e-journals and online databases. A modest collection of books for competitive exams is maintained. A user can relax with the library’s general collection of biographies, fiction, philosophy etc. Collaborative services provide library members the access to the rich collection of about 65 thousand titles, 2000 journals and 10 online databases.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by JSS College of Pharmacy, JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research, MysoreReviewed on 11 Mar 2025)

reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and good lab facilities, which is used by students of every course to build their practical knowledge. The hostel facility and food are average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by JSS Medical College, JSS Academy of Higher Education and ResearchReviewed on 10 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good. Friends are great. Campus and everything is good.
reviews.review_text: Our course is good. Teaching is good and there is a library to read. Wi-Fi is also available but there is no hostel facility. Hostel is there but only for MBBS students for them hostel is too good. Food is best compared to other hostel food. It is hygienic and hostel rooms are very clean for B.Sc. Outside PGs are available they are also too good like college hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by JSS Medical College, JSS Academy of Higher Education and ResearchReviewed on 16 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is top 24 in India this would be the best college you choose.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi all over the campus, highly facilitated laboratory, many ongoing research, availability of very good books. Wi-Fi and smart class facilitated classrooms, digital library, and library till midnight even have a department library also free research journals.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by JSS College of Pharmacy, JSS Academy of Higher Education and Research, MysoreReviewed on 4 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is worth for money if we put in full effort.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and classrooms are good enough. The infrastructure is well-built. It is very clean and good. It is very spacious enough for several purposes. Classrooms are very well-ventilated and disciplined. Daily cleaning of the rooms is done.

reviews.review_heading: No, not like I. I am very proud of my institution and very glad to be a part of it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and the food is good. The college atmosphere is good, and the faculty is very good. The classrooms are well-structured, and the labs are good. The library is well-maintained and has a wide collection of books. The college provides free Wi-Fi and has a beautiful basketball court and a large playground.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for life science.
reviews.review_text: The campus for this course or the life Science department is not as big as compared to other departments. The campus provides a small cafeteria with basic savories and beverages. The classrooms are equipped with projectors and screens. The college does not provide a hostel facility. But the area around it provides a wide range of PGs for stay.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Mysore for B.Sc. biochemistry.
reviews.review_text: The canteen food is available at a reasonable cost. The digital library is the best of all. Hostels are amazing. The sports room is the best. The digital library provides free Wi-Fi and usage of computers. Classrooms are spacious and can accommodate multiple students. Each classroom has a smart board for presentation purposes. Each washroom is hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by JSS Medical College, JSS Academy of Higher Education and ResearchReviewed on 14 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Best college for research, good infrastructure, and well-equipped labs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is superb. The building is nice and well-planned with good architecture. The campus is also nice and eco-friendly. Classrooms are very spacious, and there is a very big auditorium. The college has two libraries: one is the main library, and the other is the digital library. The Wi-Fi connection is good, and anyone can use it.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by JSS Medical College, JSS Academy of Higher Education and ResearchReviewed on 20 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Very happy and satisfied with faculties and really good infrastructure. I loved it.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure is the best; the faculties are direct to us; they help us in every manner; they explain in details; and most important, the PowerPoint they make and study is so clear and makes us concentrated; everyone is given the opportunity to keep their thoughts based on the topics.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the IQ City Medical College:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: IQ City Medical College provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Medicine & Health Sciences and Nursing, and have a fee structure of around INR 7,23,000 to 83,23,000. UG programs include B.Sc., MBBS and B.H.A. Further, the PG programs include M.Sc., MD and MS.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty are torcher on us and they are not student-friendly, and principal is very bad.

review_content.Placements: There are 200 students for 2023 batch and 2024 batch 250 and before 2023, there were 150 students. College itself gives an internship chance. College gives internship payment around Rs. 30,000, which is an increase from last few days. Before that, Rs. 20,000 were given, and before that, Rs. 120000.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is moderate food quality maintained by hostel. And hostels are neat and clean and have a good quality of service, having a warden, security staff, and a small room for sharing by 2 people. But hostel and mess charges are too high, which is not a decent level around Rs 1,66,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Modern campus with good clinical exposure but costly overall.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 100% of students get compulsory internship (mainly in the attached teaching hospital). The highest package is 8 LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA, and average is 4 LPA. Top recruiters are in-house at IQ City Medical College Hospital, Narayana Health, some join private hospitals like Apollo, Fortis, and Medical. 100% of students do a one-year paid internship (Rs 20,000 per month - Rs 25,000 per month) within the college hospital itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has modern air-conditioned lecture halls, digital smart classrooms, central library with online journals, well-equipped labs, and skill labs for clinical training. Hostels are spacious with Wi-Fi, common rooms, and gym. It has a separate mess for boys and girls. Food quality is average but hygienic. Medical facilities and ambulance are available on campus. Sports grounds for cricket, football, volleyball, and indoor games add to campus life.

review_summary.college_name: IQ City Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and healthy campus life.

content.Placements: Placements in IQ City Medical College are not like engineering colleges with packages and recruiters. Here, every MBBS student has to do a compulsory one-year internship within the college hospital, so technically, it's 100 percent placement. During an internship, we get hands-on exposure in medicine, surgery, pediatrics, OBG, etc. After that, most either prepare for NEET PG or join as junior residents/medical officers in private or government hospital. Salary depends on where you join, usually starting around 6-10 LPA. So the placement part mainly means internship and clinical training while career growth depends on individual choices later.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has a modern campus and good clinical exposure. Overall, it is expensive.

content.Placements: I am from the MBBS course under WBUHS. Nearly 100% of students get internships as it is mandatory, mostly in the college's own hospital. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. The average package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are IQ City Medical College Hospital, Narayana Health, Apollo, and Fortis. 100% of students get internships with a stipend that ranges from Rs. 20,000-25,000 per month at the attached teaching hospital. Top roles offered are junior president, house staff, and tutor.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has modern air-conditioned lecture halls, digital and smart classrooms, a central library with online journals, well-equipped labs, and skill labs for clinical training. Hostels are spacious with Wi-Fi, study rooms, and common areas. The food in the mess is average but hygienic. On-campus medical care, ambulance, sports grounds, gym, and indoor games add to campus life.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Faculty are torcher on us and they are not student-friendly, and principal is very bad.

content.Placements: There are 200 students for 2023 batch and 2024 batch 250 and before 2023, there were 150 students. College itself gives an internship chance. College gives internship payment around Rs. 30,000, which is an increase from last few days. Before that, Rs. 20,000 were given, and before that, Rs. 120000.
content.Infrastructure: There is moderate food quality maintained by hostel. And hostels are neat and clean and have a good quality of service, having a warden, security staff, and a small room for sharing by 2 people. But hostel and mess charges are too high, which is not a decent level around Rs 1,66,000.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Modern campus with good clinical exposure but costly overall.

content.Placements: Nearly 100% of students get compulsory internship (mainly in the attached teaching hospital). The highest package is 8 LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA, and average is 4 LPA. Top recruiters are in-house at IQ City Medical College Hospital, Narayana Health, some join private hospitals like Apollo, Fortis, and Medical. 100% of students do a one-year paid internship (Rs 20,000 per month - Rs 25,000 per month) within the college hospital itself.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has modern air-conditioned lecture halls, digital smart classrooms, central library with online journals, well-equipped labs, and skill labs for clinical training. Hostels are spacious with Wi-Fi, common rooms, and gym. It has a separate mess for boys and girls. Food quality is average but hygienic. Medical facilities and ambulance are available on campus. Sports grounds for cricket, football, volleyball, and indoor games add to campus life.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of IQ City Medical College.

content.Placements: 90% of students got placed from our course. The highest salary is Rs. 50,000 per month and the lowest is Rs. 30,000 per month. Top recruiting companies like Apollo, Vivekananda Hospital, Mission Hospital, and government colleges. 90% of students got internships from our college. Top roles like GDMO, RMO, housestaff, and ICU ward specials.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in our college. Labs are there in each department. They are well-equipped. Classrooms are modern and fully air-conditioned, and projector screens are available. The hostel is good and well-furnished. Single, double, and triple room facilities are available there. Both AC and non-AC rooms are available. Mess food is very good. 4 times food is served and it changes each day and season-wise. Indoor game facilities are available in the hostel.

reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi on campus. During admission, they told us that we would get Wi-Fi, but it is been around 4 years, and no Wi-Fi has been installed. Single, double, and triple-sharing rooms are present with AC and non-AC. Mineral water service provided. 24 hr water service, laundry provided. Rooms have 1 bed, table, chair, and 1 almirah. The cantee...

reviews.review_heading: In our college, improvement is required in multiple areas.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has a good environment. It has a large playground where we can play cricket, football, and badminton with our friends. There is a mall nearby where we can relax with our friends. Anyone can opt for a hostel, and seats are not limited. Our classrooms are clean. There are around 3 students in each hostel room. We have a playground in front of our hostel where we spend time with our friends. Facilities like a gym and swimming pools are not available. I would rate it 3 stars for infrastru...

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with faculty members but infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is wonderful. There are 5 lecture theatres that are named after historical personalities. They are Charaka hall, Patanjali hall, Bhardwaj hall, Atreya hall, and Sushutra hall. A library is available where students can sit and study. An external reading room is available which is different from the library. Students can carry their books and spend the whole day there. reviews.review_heading: A college with beautiful campus, highly experienced teachers, good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Campus is too beautiful. Our Hostel is clean and neat. Wi-Fi facility is available here. Food quality is also good. There are 5 fully AC lecture theater ,2library, external reading rooms. Sports ground is good with an indoor badminton court and Tt court.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IQ City Medical College.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are quite huge enough to accommodate students, and the laboratories are accessible to all the students in the presence of attendants. There is no free Wi-Fi facility, and the library is accessible to all the students. The library has all the books related to the course curriculum. Hostel rooms are quite huge, and there are single sharing, double as well as triple sharing rooms with attached bathrooms and good housekeeping staff members. The food served in the canteen is healthy and hy...

reviews.review_heading: Very Good college and ROI.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in our college is top class. The Library is well equipted. The hostel is good. The food available in canteen is also good. The labs are well-equipped. Sports facilities are available mainly outdoor sports as there is no indoor stadium.

reviews.review_heading: Good clinical training, supportive faculty, and great facilities for MBBS students.
reviews.review_text: The college had a fully equipped hospital with modern labs, operation theatres, ICUs, and OPD facilities. Classrooms were spacious with projector facilities and Wi-Fi. The library had all the updated medical textbooks and journals. Hostel facilities were good, with 24/7 water and electricity supply, clean rooms, and security. The mess food was average but hygienic. There were sports facilities, medical emergency support, and a decent canteen inside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This is best for your college life, so enjoy your college journey.

content.Placements: The placement here is not bad, but it is average. If you put in a little extra effort here, then the placement will be good, and in the coming time, it will be best to afford this college for placement. For placement, you will have to focus on skills from the first year itself, and for this, you can work on a laptop.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and it has even been renovated this year, so things are better than before. There is even Wi-Fi here, which is very helpful for the students. The library is quiet, and the benches are nice to sit on, and the classrooms are nice, and they are cleaned every shift.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Everything is fine to some extent. As a low-tier college, it is acceptable at this level.

content.Placements: I am currently doing B.Tech CSE here. I have noticed that there is one placement ongoing. I have heard most students say that everything is decent, and it also depends on your skills. You have to do everything yourself. I guess everyone just needs to hear this.
content.Infrastructure: The ground and hostel facilities are really awesome. The mess is good to some extent. Hostel services are above average. There are grounds for playing cricket, football, and indoor sports. A running track and the university gym are also available.

individual_reviews.title: My college experience is good so far.

content.Placements: I have not seen such placements here. Seniors used to tell us that we have to study hard to get a placement because the college provides very few placement opportunities. I suggest that they are improving themselves and doing well right now for the benefit of students.
