admission_process.title: Dr. Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The admission procedure for Dr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University involves multiple steps, such as appearing for the accepted entrance exam, applying, selection, counselling, and admission confirmation. Students seeking admission must fulfil all of the required admission criteria before applying. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailedDr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University admissions process:
Step 1: Dr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University Application Process 2025

Aspirants are allowed to apply online at https://dsmnru.up.nic.in.Candidates must enrol, complete academic and personal information, have scanned copies of documents attached, and pay an application fee of INR 1,000 (INR 500 SC/ST/ PwD).CUET-UG or CUET-PG scores are required for most undergraduate and postgraduate programs.Depending on the course requirements, professional programmes
Step 2: Selection Rounds

The most important requirement of selection is based on the performance in the entrance exam (CUET or other national-level examinations).In certain diploma and certificate programmes, admission is merit-based on the qualifying examination.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

The accepted applicants have to participate in the counselling process, with sitting being assigned on the basis of the entrance achievements, course selection, and booking regulations.The documents are verified, and the admission fee is paid before admission is confirmed.According to the act of 2009 Act, the DSMNRU Act 2009, the seats of every category are allotted 50% Divyang (PwD)category candidates, of which half are allotted to the blind-visual candidates.The SC, ST and OBC (non-creamy layer) of Uttar Pradesh enjoy the benefit of reservation and the SC, ST and OBC of other states are put in the General category. For the final steps the candidates will have to pay theDr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University fee.

Dr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University feesmay include various elements including Tuition Fees, Admission Fees, etc. Candidates have to pay a certain amount of fees at the time of admission. faqs.question: What is the BCom fee at the Dr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University?
faqs.answer: The four-year BCom tuition fee at Dr. Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University is INR 30,000 . The candidates have to pay the first installment of the total amount to secure their seats once the selection round is over. They will also have to pay some one-time charges along with the fee. However, the mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the BTech tuition fee at the DSMNRU?
faqs.answer: Dr. Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University BTech fee is INR 1.5 lakh for a four-year of course duration. Once the rounds of selection are completed, the shortlisted candidates are required to pay the first installment of the total fee. They might also be asked to pay some one-time charges and miscellaneous fees along with the tuition fee. However, t he mentioned fee is taken from the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.

description: Dr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Dr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Dr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Dr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 306755 and 1282169 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competitio

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 306755 for the general HS quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 279645 in 2023 and 282313 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated fluctuating trend.

As the Dr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at Dr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University.
In this section, students can see UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations.

For 2025, in the last round, the top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Finance Management), followed by B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, and B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering, with the closing ranks of , and , respecti

hostel_campus.college_name: DSMNRU Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: This is best for your college life, so enjoy your college journey.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and it has even been renovated this year, so things are better than before. There is even Wi-Fi here, which is very helpful for the students. The library is quiet, and the benches are nice to sit on, and the classrooms are nice, and they are cleaned every shift.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is fine to some extent. As a low-tier college, it is acceptable at this level.
reviews.review_text: The ground and hostel facilities are really awesome. The mess is good to some extent. Hostel services are above average. There are grounds for playing cricket, football, and indoor sports. A running track and the university gym are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is fine enough its like a college you have to do everything on your own.
reviews.review_text: Everything else is good enough its not much excellent but its good enough like class ground and hostel facility is fine enough. Its like you just grow only here if you find people here of the same mindset otherwise you have to do everything else by your own. Auditorium and other facilities are there.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University.
reviews.review_text: There are many courses available for students to learn and grow by studying. There are good facilities for sports like badminton, football, athletics, and judo. The coaches are available at the university. Hostels are good. Food is also good, in terms of care, health, and hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: My college experience is good so far.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is amazing one of the best infrastructures I have ever seen. The area of the campus is insane like 131 acres. We have a good hostel life and all and everything is good. The library section is one of my favourite areas where I spend a lot of time.

reviews.review_heading: I'm a student of Civil Engineering, batch 2024 at IET DSMNRU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good in my college; they have many buildings for other departments, like the IET department. Spread across 131 acres, the campus features architecturally distinct buildings designed with accessibility in mind, including ramps, lifts, and wide corridors suitable for differently-abled students. Engineering and IT departments have well-equipped, air-conditioned labs. For CSE, there are separate labs for Operating Systems, Network, DBMS, AI/ML, and more. Civil engineering ...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students. We also learn about life-changing challenges here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in my college. Classrooms are very good. There is Wi-Fi, labs, and the library in my college. A computer lab is available. It also has an auditorium.

reviews.review_heading: I am okay with facilities provided by our college as it have good infrastructure also.
reviews.review_text: College has very good infrastructure and classrooms. Wi-Fi is available in many areas such as hostels and library. College provides very good facilities of hostel and mess food and also good infrastructure for sports and games. All types of grounds and stadiums are available for practice. College has a 24/7 ambulance available in our college for medical emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: This is a state government university.
reviews.review_text: Campus and facilities are extremely good. It is a state government university. All facilities are available. Library is available and there is also Lift available in every building. So we can say that college infrastructure is very good.

reviews.review_heading: The overall review of the university; you can take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the hostel infrastructure, as well as the university infrastructure, are just awesome, which makes for a good environment on campus. The university provides many facilities, like a well-equipped library where students can study and a canteen whose quality is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University.
reviews.review_text: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, with LAN and Ethernet connections in every room. Labs are being developed and getting equipped with time. The library is also Wi-Fi enabled and well furnished, with three floors and all the necessary study material we need.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are average facilities like labs, classrooms, libraries, and Wi-Fi campuses. There are also sports and medical facilities available. There are many athletes who have played at the state level. The canteen is average because of a lack of infrastructure but it develops day by day because of our new VC, sir.

reviews.review_heading: College review about IET - DSMNRU .
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are provided with infrastructure like fans, benches, a board, and windows. Classrooms are spacious. The college has one common library. library is well maintained and has good collection of books. Students can borrow course-related books from library. Wi-Fi facility are available only in computer labs. The computer lab was well-equipped and had AC as well. I didn't opt for hostels so not have little idea about hostels. The college has an ambulance, which they provide in case of a medi...

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the all things except placement cell.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. The university theme is similar to IIT, and it offers all courses such as engineering, medical, commerce, arts, and education. All departments are separate, and there is no interference between them. The hostel is good, and all the basic necessities are available at the university.

reviews.review_heading: Gem faculty, college in transition stage.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are really good, well-furnished, and properly ventilated. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled; you just need to get your ID and password. The labs are also designed to suit us with all the necessary equipment. The library has all the necessary materials according to our curriculum plus some well-known literary works. I don't live in the hostel, but the sports facilities are world-class, with the campus having its own indoor stadium.

college_info.college_name: DSMNRU

data.description: Yes, hostel facilities for male and female students are provided by Dr. Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University. Further, according to the official brochure, the institution provides its hostel and mess facilities without any charge, along with zero tuition fees for disabled students. However, non-disabled students have to pay the respective hostel fee, along with other one-time charges as well.

college_info.college_name: DSMNRU Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The four-year BA fee at Dr. Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University is INR 3,000. The candidates need to pay the first installment of the entire amount to reserve their seats when the rounds of selection are complete. They may also need to pay certain one-time charges apart from the fee. However, the mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.

Yes, Dr. Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University (DSMNRU) provides scholarships for its BBA programme, including national as well as state government scholarships under schemes like the National Handicapped Finance and Development Corporation and the State Government Scholarship scheme. Such scholarship-eligible students can apply for them through the university or its respective government portals.

Yes, Dr. Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University (DSMNRU) does offer scholarships for its BA programme, including national and state government-sponsored scholarships under schemes, such as the National Handicapped Finance and Development Corporation and the State Government Scholarship scheme. Students who qualify for a scholarship can seek this through the university or the respective government websites.

Besides the BA course tuition fees at Dr. Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University, students may pay other one-time fees. These can range from an application fee, security deposit, and other miscellaneous fees. Additionally, the BA programme tuition fee at DSMNRU stands at INR 3,000. However, the aforementioned fee structure has been sourced from the official website/sanctioned body. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely great college overall from infrastructure to faculty.

review_content.Placements: 100% All students graduated from the college get placed in rural services. Placements to be done after internship. On an average, the salary is around 60000 rupees for the entry level; later, you can apply for medical officer or residents in hospitals or colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: New and super infrastructure as the college started in 2018, and labs are full of equipment, and classrooms are big to accommodate 180 students. The library is very big and hygienic, offering a large spectrum of books for medical students. Hostels are good with each room accommodating 3 students.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College.

review_content.Placements: Our pass-out seniors are working at good posts in very good hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure facilities in our college are too good. There are new buildings which are very well equipped and have furnished rooms. Lecture theatres are air-conditioned with a huge seating capacity and a perfect operating system for lectures. We have our hospital and library, both are integrally connected with the college and are very well-equipped with a good count of patient beds in the hospital. We are attached with a district hospital at Vidisha. There are different grounds for outdoor games and a common room is designed for indoor games. The mess is too good for other colleges. We have 5-6 different mess operating in our all hostels.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a very beautiful garden and there is greenery on campus.

review_content.Placements: It is the first batch of our college, and around 150 students selected through NEET are currently in their 3rd year of college. In 2022, our batch will be ready for 1-year internship program after the NEXT 1 exam which will be held on January 2023 from the current news i.e earlier it is known as PRE PG.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our institute and hostel are well furnished, and there are multiple buildings for different departments and have good space between the building. There is fully Wi-Fi support and excellent quality of laboratories with digital classrooms and the e-library is fully established with fully air-conditioned. The food served in mess is good, hygiene, and taste.

overview_faqs.question: Is Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College is a renowned institution offering Certificate, UG Diploma, MD, MS, MBBS. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College boasts an impressive review rating of 4.77 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4.71 for Campus Life, 4.86 for Placements, 4.71 for Faculty, and 4.71 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: An excellent college at an average location.

content.Placements: Atal Bihar Vajpayee Government Medical College (ABVGMC) in Vidisha offers a 100% placement rate for its graduates, with a focus on rural services. Graduates typically begin their careers with an average salary of around Rs. 60,000, with opportunities for advancement to medical officer or president positions in hospitals or colleges. It offers a wide range of courses. From MBBS to lab technician. Our seniors have also secured AIR under 100 in NEET PG and many more AIRs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite good and well-maintained. It consists of a total of four lecture theatres, which can hold a total strength of 200 students at a time. The building has a plant ecosystem at the centre of each award. Mess is present in the hostel building itself.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Atal Bihar Vajpayee Medical College ranks 6th in Madhya Pradesh.

content.Placements: 100% of all students graduated from the college get placed in rural services. Placements are to be done after the internship. On average, the salary is around 50,000 to 60,000 rupees for the entry level monthly. Later, you can apply for medical officer or residency positions in hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: Atal Bihar Vajpayee Medical College has separate departments. The college infrastructure is fantastic. The college has separate hostels for girls and boys, as well as a hostel for faculty. The college also has cricket, volleyball, and football grounds, along with a gym.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely great college overall from infrastructure to faculty.

content.Placements: 100% All students graduated from the college get placed in rural services. Placements to be done after internship. On an average, the salary is around 60000 rupees for the entry level; later, you can apply for medical officer or residents in hospitals or colleges.
content.Infrastructure: New and super infrastructure as the college started in 2018, and labs are full of equipment, and classrooms are big to accommodate 180 students. The library is very big and hygienic, offering a large spectrum of books for medical students. Hostels are good with each room accommodating 3 students.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College.

content.Placements: Our pass-out seniors are working at good posts in very good hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure facilities in our college are too good. There are new buildings which are very well equipped and have furnished rooms. Lecture theatres are air-conditioned with a huge seating capacity and a perfect operating system for lectures. We have our hospital and library, both are integrally connected with the college and are very well-equipped with a good count of patient beds in the hospital. We are attached with a district hospital at Vidisha. There are different grounds for outdoor games and a common room is designed for indoor games. The mess is too good for other colleges. We have 5-6 different mess operating in our all hostels.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a very beautiful garden and there is greenery on campus.

content.Placements: It is the first batch of our college, and around 150 students selected through NEET are currently in their 3rd year of college. In 2022, our batch will be ready for 1-year internship program after the NEXT 1 exam which will be held on January 2023 from the current news i.e earlier it is known as PRE PG.
content.Infrastructure: Our institute and hostel are well furnished, and there are multiple buildings for different departments and have good space between the building. There is fully Wi-Fi support and excellent quality of laboratories with digital classrooms and the e-library is fully established with fully air-conditioned. The food served in mess is good, hygiene, and taste.

cut_off.college_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College Cutoff 2025: Check NEET UG Round Wise Ranks

description: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 26279 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College MBBS cutoff 2025 was 26279 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 16572 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 82550 to 110496. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were M.D. in Community Medicine, followed by M.D. in Forensic Medicine. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 82550 and 110496, respectively.
For the students belonging to the OBC category, the NEET PG Round 4 closing was 112308.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College MD cutoff 2025 was released across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for different categories under the Home State quota. As per the Round 2 cutoff data, the top two most competitive MD specialisations for admission were MD in General Medicine and M.D. in Obstetrics and Gynaecology, with MP NEET PG cutoff ranks of 4176 and 8363, respectively.

reviews_list.review_title: Good education, infrastructure, and hospitality.

review_content.Placements: Around 70-80% of the students have been recruited with selection in post-graduation. 100% of the students get internship courses. The highest packages offered in our course have gone more than crores. Around 150 students are placed in my course for every batch.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided by my college are exceptional with top-notch furniture and clean classrooms. The library of our college is exemplary with proper seating arrangements and ventilation provided. The quality of the food provided in the mess and canteen is delicious, healthy, and safe for everyone.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: OVERALL GOOD, Good Falculties, Good Premises and good Hostels.

review_content.Placements: No placements to the hospitals are provided, but the student cutoff rates are always higher as it is one of the best college for dental in Maharashtra, Many students get internship with or without category, so this thing is good abut the college and fee is decreased for many.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good facilities and overall good infrastructure, free Wi-Fi are available all the time in the whole campus as well as at hostels, classrooms r well-equipped with Acs, library is best, Labs are also well constructed and it is overall very good college.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I would recommend it for good teaching with a decent number of patients for clinical exposure.

review_content.Placements: Our college offers placements or professional standards for opening the clinic. Almost 98% of students were given internship opportunities. At the end of the course, everyone felt confident enough to open their own private clinic and work with live patients.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was excellent. It is well planned and connected to nature, with a beautiful garden. Well-built grounds, all sports, and gym equipment were present. The hostel was well built, clean, and spacious. Rooms were furnished, and there was also a salon for girls inside the hostel campus. The library was well-equipped with all the required books and computer facilities. There was a separate library for hostel students. The canteen was also good at serving hygienic food, with proper chairs and tables. Classrooms were spacious, well ventilated, and had projectors. One medical shop was available on campus.

overview_faqs.question: Is SMBT Group of Institutions a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: SMBT Group of Institutions is a distinguished institution offering MD, MS, B.Sc, B.A.M.S, B.Pharma, D.Pharma, M.Pharma, MBBS. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing field. SMBT Group of Institutions is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. SMBT Group of Institutions has received an impressive review rating of 5 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 5 for Campus Life, 5 for Placements, 5 for Faculty, and 5 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: SMBT Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Basic B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College is good. If you want to get admission at this college without any thoughts, go for it.

content.Placements: 60% of students got placed on campus. This was good ratio as compared to other colleges. Here minimum salary was Rs 60,000 to Rs 70,000 per month by SMBT Ayurveda Hospital and some other colleges. Mostly students complete their internships at SMBT Ayurveda Hospital, and interns got the chance to do their best.
content.Infrastructure: For dissection of body in college, there were separate classrooms for all batches. 24-hour Wi-Fi and filtered water were available. Library had a big space to study. We had all the courses and related books available. Cleaning was good on campus. In college, building all over was a good choice.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college is very nice because of faculty members, facilities, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our college is a dental college so we are doctors or dentists. Our college students who qualify for NEET MS are pursuing MS in various colleges. Some are direct to one clinic. Some are going abroad like Australia, New Zealand, and UAE, and some are joining as lecturers.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good and have air conditioning system. Teaching is conducted on a digital board. Department and lab are also well maintained by advanced equipment. Hostel is good and newly renovated. For bathing, warm water facilities are also available. For students, inductions are available for making snacks and nasta.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good education, infrastructure, and hospitality.

content.Placements: Around 70-80% of the students have been recruited with selection in post-graduation. 100% of the students get internship courses. The highest packages offered in our course have gone more than crores. Around 150 students are placed in my course for every batch.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided by my college are exceptional with top-notch furniture and clean classrooms. The library of our college is exemplary with proper seating arrangements and ventilation provided. The quality of the food provided in the mess and canteen is delicious, healthy, and safe for everyone.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: OVERALL GOOD, Good Falculties, Good Premises and good Hostels.

content.Placements: No placements to the hospitals are provided, but the student cutoff rates are always higher as it is one of the best college for dental in Maharashtra, Many students get internship with or without category, so this thing is good abut the college and fee is decreased for many.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities and overall good infrastructure, free Wi-Fi are available all the time in the whole campus as well as at hostels, classrooms r well-equipped with Acs, library is best, Labs are also well constructed and it is overall very good college.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I would recommend it for good teaching with a decent number of patients for clinical exposure.

content.Placements: Our college offers placements or professional standards for opening the clinic. Almost 98% of students were given internship opportunities. At the end of the course, everyone felt confident enough to open their own private clinic and work with live patients.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was excellent. It is well planned and connected to nature, with a beautiful garden. Well-built grounds, all sports, and gym equipment were present. The hostel was well built, clean, and spacious. Rooms were furnished, and there was also a salon for girls inside the hostel campus. The library was well-equipped with all the required books and computer facilities. There was a separate library for hostel students. The canteen was also good at serving hygienic food, with proper chairs and tables. Classrooms were spacious, well ventilated, and had projectors. One medical shop was available on campus.

college_info.college_name: JECRC University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2026, Placements, Rankings

highlights.summary:
JECRC University Admissions Open

The CLAT PG 2026 third merit list is out for JECRC University admission to the PG-level LLM programme. The fourth merit list will be out on May 2, 2026 (10 PM).

table.details: Jaipur Engineering College and Research Centre

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes of JECRC University are its BTech, MTech and MBA courses being well sought-out among students for their flexibility when it comes to specialisations as well as the placement opportunities and career growth after graduation.
The JECRC University BTech covers 21+ specialisations with the programme having a focus on skill development and hands-on learning in a variety of technology focused disciplines.
While the JECRC University MBA imparts management techniques covering topics such as Business Analysis, HR, Finance, etc.
Also, the JECRC University MTech allows students to specialise deeper in their chosen field and serves as a fast-track for students who are more suited for research-oriented or wish to undertake more advanced roles whether it be conducting research or developing new tools and products.
Apart from this, the JECRC University Vidhani also features a range of courses offered in distance mode of education through its Directorate of Distance Education. The courses are given in different specialisations, and students can open the university page to learn more about course-specific specialisations. Interested students can check the other popular programmes of JECRC University in this space:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Students get substantial industry exposure
Many students started their own start-ups
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

faqs.answer: A:    The key highlights of JE CRC University placements 2025 are presented below:Particulars Placement Statistics (2025)the highest packageINR 33 LPA (Amazon)Average packageINR 6 LPATotal offers2,230 (As on March 20,  2025)Company-wise offers860 offers: Global IT companies125 offers: Accenture & TCS for BCA, BBA and BCom825 offers: Fortune 500 companiesStudents placed with package above INR 7 LPA876Companies visited140+Top sector46% offers made in Emerging Tech Roles
faqs.question: Is there 100% placement in JECRC University?

faqs.answer: A:    The highest package offered during JECRC University placements 2026 stood at INR 33 LPA. The participating recruiters have made 1030 offers so far to the overall Class of 2026. Some of the top recruiters include HP, Deloitte, Wipro, Capgemini, Hashira, L&T, Nestle, Dabur, Decathlon, Zomato, etc.
faqs.question: What is the highest placement package offered at JECRC University?

faqs.answer: A:    JECRC University has not released the course-specific report. However, as per the overall placement report. The highest package offered during JECRC University placements in 2024 stood at INR 52 LPA. Further, an improving trend was witnessed in the highest package offered over the past three years during JECRC University placements, which is presented below:ParticularsPlacement Statistics (2022)Placement Statistics (2023)Placement Statistics (2024)the highest packageINR 44 LPAINR 44 LPAINR
faqs.question: What is the highest placement package offered to MBA students at JECRC University?

faqs.answer: A:    A total of 2,230 offers have been made so far during JECRC University placements 2026. In the first 100 days of placement process, 80 companies visited the campus and placed students with good packages.
faqs.question: How many offers are made during JECRC University placements?

faqs.answer: A:    JECRC University BCom course fees vary from INR 1.6 Lacs to INR 2.3 lakh. A one-time payment of INR 10,000 may be part of the entire fee structure, which comprises tuition fees, hostel fees, and other amounts. The applicant may cross-check the following JECRC University BCom fee structure:Fee componentsAmount (for 3 years)TuitionINR 1.62 Lacs - INR 2.25 lakhHostelINR 3.86 lakhOne-time PaymentINR 10,000Total feeINR 5.58 Lacs - INR 6.21 lakhNOTE: The mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the BCom course fee at JECRC University?

faqs.answer: A:    Students can get admission to courses such as BA (Hons), BCom, BCA, MCA, etc. without any entrance exam scores. Such aspirants are shortlisted based on their merit in the last qualifying exam.
faqs.question: Can I join JECRC University without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    The course fee for JECRC University BA programme is INR 90000 for an academic year. For an hons degree students need to pay a total fee of INR 3.6 lakh. The BA course fee is INR 2.7 Lacs for the entire three year course.
faqs.question: What is the course fee for BA at JECRC?

faqs.answer: A:    JECRC University accepts multiple national-level entrance exams, such as CUET-UG, CUET-PG, JEE Main, CAT, MAT, XAT, etc., for admission to specific programmes. JECRC University also offers admission to courses based on the merit of the applicants in the last qualifying exam. The university considers CUET-UG for most of the UG courses, such as BTech, BBA, BCA, BCom, BDes, etc. Aspirants also need to pass a personal interview round for admission to a few courses.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by JECRC University?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: JECRC University really has great infrastructure, and its main factor is the events it conducts.

review_content.Placements: Placements in JECRC University are around 90 percent. The highest package was 32 LPA in 2025, the lowest was 2-3 Lakhs, and the average package was 6.8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Deloitte, Microsoft, etc. Top roles offered were Data Scientists and software developers (both backend and frontend).
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of JECRC University is way better than other competing universities in Jaipur. Classrooms are fully furnished with power sockets inbuilt in each bench, Wi-Fi, AC installed in labs, and a dispensary for any medical emergency. The quality of food available in the hostel is not that good. The canteen has several outlets which have great taste, such as Domino's, etc. JECRC University has great sports infrastructure, from courts of individual to team sports to equipment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college is overall good, just I feel the campus is not so good like others.

review_content.Placements: I have started my B. Tech in 2024, and at that time the total placements from JECRC University and JECRC Foundation are around 2000 placements. In B. Tech, around 1000 students are placed from JECRC University, and around 75 percent of students from B. Tech got placement. The highest package is 50 LPA, the average is 6 to 7 LPA, and the lowest package is around 3.5–4 LPA. There are top recruiting companies like Amazon, Microsoft, TCS, Accenture, Infosys, Capgemini, Wipro, and the roles offered are software developer, software engineer, data scientist, data science analyst, etc.

course_faqs.question: How is the dissertation in JECRC University MBA?
course_faqs.answer: In the fourth semester, students need to take a specific research project to understand concepts of subject that have been opted in the programme elective. Students are expected to understand emerging market trends and finding solutions to business problems through proper research process. After successfully completing the project, submit the report to the department. After this, they need to undergo Viva-voce before external and internal subject experts to acquire degree in Management.

course_faqs.question: What is the hostel fee for JECRC University MBA students?
course_faqs.answer: Hostel fee ranges between INR 1.27 lpa to INR 1.72 lpa. There are three room categories in the hostel, including:AC roomNon-AC three-seated room andNon-AC four-seated roomEach room has a different per annum fee. Hostel fee will be paid in two instalments. Do remember that the hostel will be allotted for only two-years. Students need to pay a one-time registration fee of INR 5,000.

course_faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria to get a scholarship for MBA programme at JECRC University?
course_faqs.answer: Some of the scholarships offered by JECRC University to its UG and PG programmes:1. Merit based scholarships2. CAT percentile based scholarships: Students with CAT percentile between 40 to 59.99 gets 15 percent scholarship on tuition fees. Students with a CAT percentile of 60 and above can get 20% scholarship on tuition fees.3. Need based scholarships: This scholarship is offered to students from financially weak backgrounds.

review_summary.college_name: JECRC University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College life is good, however, the placements are not too good.

content.Placements: 10% classmates were placed in office companies, and the rest of them are jobless, doing jobs in BPOs and other fields like sales and marketing. So all average, the placements were not good. I also got my first interview cleared in a sales role, however, they don’t allow us to sit in other internships as one is cleared.
content.Infrastructure: The classroom and infrastructure were good. Labs and libraries were also fine. The canteen was good as well. Sports facilities were good. Medical facilities were also fine, everything was fine.
content.Faculty: Examinations were also average. Courses were not provided by the college. semester wise examining were not so hard, however, you will have to study by yourself, as the study material, like books and copies, was not included in the fees and not provided by the college, so be prepared.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college because it gives you an amazing college life.

content.Placements: I am a fresher, but as I see my seniors, in comparison to the rest of the colleges, it is far better. The placement statistics are for the batch of 2026. The highest package is INR 33-52 LPA. Average package is INR 6.67-6.8 LPA. As we see, college with this type of college life is crazy.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel food is average, but rooms are amazing, you get a private room even in a 3-sharing room, as the hostel is like a 3 BHK flat. You have a common room and a common bathroom, and you have full privacy. There are some strict rules in the hostel that are strictly followed. The labs are also well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: JECRC University really has great infrastructure, and its main factor is the events it conducts.

content.Placements: Placements in JECRC University are around 90 percent. The highest package was 32 LPA in 2025, the lowest was 2-3 Lakhs, and the average package was 6.8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Deloitte, Microsoft, etc. Top roles offered were Data Scientists and software developers (both backend and frontend).
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of JECRC University is way better than other competing universities in Jaipur. Classrooms are fully furnished with power sockets inbuilt in each bench, Wi-Fi, AC installed in labs, and a dispensary for any medical emergency. The quality of food available in the hostel is not that good. The canteen has several outlets which have great taste, such as Domino's, etc. JECRC University has great sports infrastructure, from courts of individual to team sports to equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is overall good, just I feel the campus is not so good like others.

content.Placements: I have started my B. Tech in 2024, and at that time the total placements from JECRC University and JECRC Foundation are around 2000 placements. In B. Tech, around 1000 students are placed from JECRC University, and around 75 percent of students from B. Tech got placement. The highest package is 50 LPA, the average is 6 to 7 LPA, and the lowest package is around 3.5–4 LPA. There are top recruiting companies like Amazon, Microsoft, TCS, Accenture, Infosys, Capgemini, Wipro, and the roles offered are software developer, software engineer, data scientist, data science analyst, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: JECRC files pros and cons.

content.Placements: The percentage of students is 40 to 50 percent who are placed. This year, the highest is, I guess, 33 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HPE and Meta. For internships, the ratio is again low, it's 45 to 50 percent. The top role offered is an employee.
content.Infrastructure: I like the infrastructure, it's unique, and you'll definitely feel a friendly environment here. The mess food is good, and the classrooms are also good, kind of like a school vibe, but okay. Wi-Fi works fine, but they can still work on it. Sports facilities are quite good. We have volleyball football, cricket, basketball, tennis, badminton, and pickleball courts.

admission_overview.title: JECRC University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: The university offers more than 25 programmes across various streams such as Engineering, Management, Commerce, Computer Applications, etc. The university offers courses either is offline or distance-education mode. The university offers Offline , full time courses along with Distance education too. Applications for the same are accepted strictly online. The courses offered at UG, PG,PhD, Diploma and Certficate. Read on to know more about Admission process, Application process, Fees, Course eligibility criteria etc for JECRC University.

The university accepts entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, CUET-UG, JEE Main, etc. for admission to specific courses. Aspirants must also fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for admission. faqs.answer: JECRC University admission is both merit and entrance-based. The university offers BTech, BBA, BSc (Hons), etc. at the UG level. The duration of UG courses range from three to five years. Candidates who have passed Class 12 are eligible to apply for UG courses. The university offers MTech, MBA, MSc (Hons), etc. at the PG level. The duration of PG courses is two years. Candidates who have passed graduation are eligible to apply for PG courses. The mode of application is online for all courses.

admission_process.title: JECRC University Admissions Process 2026

paragraphs: JECRC University admission 2026is bothmerit-basedandentrance-based. JECRC University course admission offersmore than 25 coursesat theUG, PG, PhD,PG Diploma, and Certificate programme level through11 schoolsexcluding the Directorate of Executive Education and PhD. The university also offers distance education through theDirectorate of Distance Education. Besides this,JECRC Universityoffers a range of professionalcertificates and diplomacourses through JECRC online.

JECRC admission procedurestarts with filling out an application form for the desired course by applicants. To apply for admission, candidates must ensure that they are meeting the admission requirements set by the university. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university;
Step 1: JECRC University Application Process 2026

The mode of application is online. Candidates must fill out the application form on the university's website. Aspirants applying for a UG or a PG programme need to pay an application fee ofINR 850. The application fee for PhD programmes isINR 1,500.
Step 2: Selection

The university selects candidates for admission to most of the courses based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. JECRC University also considers scores CUET-UG and CUET-PG scores for some of the UG and PG programmes, respectively. The university also accepts JEE Main, CAT, MAT, etc. for admission to specific courses. Aspirants also need to further pass a personal interview round for courses such as BAJMC, Integrated Law, BA (Hons), etc.
Step 3: Final Admission
Selected candidates need to report at the campus for document verification. Further, aspirants need to pay theJECRC University feeto confirm their seat.

courses_data.name: JECRC University BTech Admission 2026
eligibility: Accepting Exams:JEE Main, CUET, CBSE 12th, ISC, RBSE 12th
courses_data.description: JECRC University offers a four-year BTech course divided into eight semesters. The university offers BTech in various specialisations such asComputer Science,Civil, Mechanical, Electronics & Communication, CSE Artificial Intelligence & Data Science,CSE Cyber Security, etc. at the UG level. The university prefers candidates with a valid score in JEE Main. Aspirants with a CUET-UG score can also apply for admission.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria of BTech at JECRC University?
faqs.answer: JECRC University selects candidates for admission to BTech programme based on entrance exam scores. The university prefers aspirants with a valid JEE Main score for admission. Candidates with a CUET-UG score can also apply for BTech. Besides, candidates must also fulfil the eligibility requirements to get a seat in the BTech course of JECRC University. Once the selection process is over, aspirants can confirm their seat by paying the course fee.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at JECRC University?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have passed Class 12 with a minimum of 60% aggregate in all subjects with pass in English, Physics andMathematicsand one subject out of Chemistry, Biology, Biotechnology and Technical vocational subject are eligible to apply for JECRC University BTech programme. Candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at JECRC University?
faqs.answer: JECRC University offers BTech for four-years at the UG level. The programme is spread across eight semesters. The university offers BTech to candidates who have completed Class 12 in relevant subjects. Below are some of the BTech specialisations offered at JECRC University:Computer Science EngineeringCivil EngineeringMechanical EngineeringElectronics & Communication EngineeringCSE Artificial Intelligence & Data ScienceCSE Cyber Security, etc.

faqs.question: What to do after the declaration of CUET result?
faqs.answer: The final CUET answer key published by the NTA serves as the basis for the CUET result. Following this, it is anticipated that all of the participating universities will publish their separate cut-off lists (admission/merit lists) and dates for student acceptance to various UG programs.Candidates must now complete the application in order to be admitted to the college they choose during the application process. Depending on the number of open seats, the college will release a separate cutoff and

courses_data.name: JECRC University BBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: JECRC University offers a three-year BBA programme divided into six semesters. The university offers BBA,BBA in Banking Financial Services & Insuranceand BBA with industry specialisations. Candidates who have completed Class 12 examination from CBSE or equivalent with at least 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ ST/ Rajasthan state OBC Non-creamy layer/ women category) can apply for the BBA course at JECRC University. The selection for BBA is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam or CUET-UG scores.

faqs.question: What is the admission process at JECRC University?
faqs.answer: The admission process at JECRC University consists of both national-level entrances and institute-level selection rounds for the MBA, BTech, BA LLB, BBA LLB and M.Tech courses while others depend on merit as well as Personal Interview and Group Interview rounds conducted by the institute for admissions at JECRC Jaipur.

faqs.question: Is getting into JECRC University tough?
faqs.answer: It is difficult to say whether getting into JECRC University is tough or easy and will depend on the:Candidate's level of preparationCompetitionAvailable seatsPersonal motivationAs well as a number of other factors that will not be discussed here. But admissions to the different courses at the university will depend on entrance exam scores such asCUET, CAT, MAT,XAT, JEE Main, etc. for its different courses.

courses_data.name: JECRC University MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: JECRC University offers a two-year MBA programme divided into four semesters. The university offers MBA in Dual Specialisation and with industry specialisations. Admission to the MBA programme is based on CAT, MAT or XAT scores. Selected candidates are further called for a group discussion and personal interview round for final selection. The course fee for the MBA programme isINR 3 lakh,or INR 75,000 per semester.

faqs.question: What is the course fees of JECRC University MBA?
faqs.answer: The total annual fee for JECRC University MBA ranges betweenINR 2.50 lakhandINR 2.75 lakh. Aspirants also need to pay INR 10,000 as admission & alumni one-time non-refundable fee. Candidates need to pay the first installment, alumni and admission fee for seat confirmation.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for the MBA course offered at JECRC University?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have passed a bachelor's degree of three-years from a recognised university with at least 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ ST/ Rajasthan state OBC Non-creamy layer / women category) can apply for JECRC University MBA programme. Candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: What are the entrance exams accepted by JECRC for the MBA programme?
faqs.answer: JECRC follows a two-year MBA programme at the PG level. Candidates are required to follow the admission process set by JECRC and admit the candidates on the basis of their perfromance in entrance exams such as CAT/MAT/XAT candidates are required to appear for these national level management exams in order to participate in the admission process.

courses_data.name: JECRC University MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: JECRC University offers a two-year MBA programme divided into four semesters. The university offers MBA in Dual Specialisation and with industry specialisations. Admission to the MBA programme is based on CAT, MAT or XAT scores. Selected candidates are further called for a group discussion and personal interview round for final selection. The course fee for the MBA programme isINR 3 lakh,or INR 75,000 per semester.

faqs.question: What is the course fees of JECRC University MBA?
faqs.answer: The total annual fee for JECRC University MBA ranges betweenINR 2.50 lakhandINR 2.75 lakh. Aspirants also need to pay INR 10,000 as admission & alumni one-time non-refundable fee. Candidates need to pay the first installment, alumni and admission fee for seat confirmation.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for the MBA course offered at JECRC University?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have passed a bachelor's degree of three-years from a recognised university with at least 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ ST/ Rajasthan state OBC Non-creamy layer / women category) can apply for JECRC University MBA programme. Candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: What are the entrance exams accepted by JECRC for the MBA programme?
faqs.answer: JECRC follows a two-year MBA programme at the PG level. Candidates are required to follow the admission process set by JECRC and admit the candidates on the basis of their perfromance in entrance exams such as CAT/MAT/XAT candidates are required to appear for these national level management exams in order to participate in the admission process.

faqs.question: What are the eligibility requirements for admission to the BA at JECRC University?

faqs.question: Can I join JECRC University without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Students can get admission to courses such as BA (Hons), BCom, BCA, MCA, etc. without any entrance exam scores. Such aspirants are shortlisted based on their merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by JECRC University?
faqs.answer: JECRC University accepts multiple national-level entrance exams, such as CUET-UG, CUET-PG, JEE Main, CAT, MAT, XAT, etc., for admission to specific programmes. JECRC University also offers admission to courses based on the merit of the applicants in the last qualifying exam. The university considers CUET-UG for most of the UG courses, such as BTech, BBA, BCA, BCom, BDes, etc. Aspirants also need to pass a personal interview round for admission to a few courses.

faqs.question: Is CUET exam registration open?
faqs.answer: Yes, Common University Entrance Test (CUET) 2026 registration commenced at cuet.nta.nic.in. NTA released the CUET 2026 notification on January 03 and reopened the window on February 23. Soon after the release of the CUET official notification, theCUET registration 2026process commenced online at the official website. Candidates willing to appear for the CUET 2026 exam must have completed complete the application form online. Additionally, before filling application form, candidates must make sure that they have fulfilled the prescribedCUET eligibility criteriato qualify for the entrance exam.

placement_report.college_name: JECRC University Placements 2026: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: JECRC University Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: JECRC University has started the placements for the Class of 2026. In the first 100 days of placement process, 80 companies visited the campus and placed students with good packages. The overall highest package offered during JECRC University placements 2026 stood at INR 33 LPA , whereas the average package offered to the batch 2026 stood at INR 6.67 LPA . The participating recruiters have made 1030 offers so far to the overall Class of 2026. The top recruiters of JECRC University in 2026 include HP, Deloitte, Wipro, Capgemini, Hashira, L&T, Nestle, Dabur, Decathlon, Zomato, etc.

According to the JECRC University NIRF Report 2025, the students of the MBA batch 2024 secured the median salary of INR 4.75 LPA . 246 students of the MBA batch 2024 were placed out of the total 248 graduated students.

hostel_campus.college_name: JECRC University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel of the university has an on-campus residential facility for students has been very thoughtfully designed and planned. An apartment style -three private, single occupancy rooms open into a common living room equipped with a television set, internet access and a pantry making it a completely independent unit. The hostels are air-conditioned/ Nonair-conditioned, comfortable and conducive for the students to have a productive campus life, providing a perfect setting for academic pursuits.

library.description: The library of the university has a good collection of reference and textbooks and journals of national and international repute is available for the students. The library subscribes to both national and regional newspapers and magazines and journals for the benefit of students and general readers. The library, in addition to the textbook, caters for general reading and has a special section for books and journals for competitive examinations. The students have access to the online e-learning portal for integrated learning including NPTEL.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Volley ball Court, Table Tennis, Jacuzzi and spa, Billiards

cafeteria.description: The double storied students' mess next to the hostel complex offers excellent multi-cuisine food to the campus residents. The centrally air-conditioned dining area is supported by the kitchen, mess and cafeteria. The complex also envisages to house convenience stores to meet the daily needs of the residents.

reviews.review_heading: College life is good, however, the placements are not too good.
reviews.review_text: The classroom and infrastructure were good. Labs and libraries were also fine. The canteen was good as well. Sports facilities were good. Medical facilities were also fine, everything was fine.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college because it gives you an amazing college life.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is average, but rooms are amazing, you get a private room even in a 3-sharing room, as the hostel is like a 3 BHK flat. You have a common room and a common bathroom, and you have full privacy. There are some strict rules in the hostel that are strictly followed. The labs are also well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: JECRC University really has great infrastructure, and its main factor is the events it conducts.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of JECRC University is way better than other competing universities in Jaipur. Classrooms are fully furnished with power sockets inbuilt in each bench, Wi-Fi, AC installed in labs, and a dispensary for any medical emergency. The quality of food available in the hostel is not that good. The canteen has several outlets which have great taste, such as Domino's, etc. JECRC University has great sports infrastructure, from courts of individual to team sports to equipment.

reviews.review_heading: The college is overall good, just I feel the campus is not so good like others.
reviews.review_text: I am pursuing M.A. B. Tech in Computer Science. There are lots of well-working computer labs with decent Wi-Fi facilities for practice in university, clean and spacious classrooms for theory classes, multiple halls and auditoriums for seminars, and a silent library for studies with access to computers in the library. The hostel is well-structured. The best part about the hostel is that it has personal rooms, a good and proper attendance system, and a gym included in the boys’ hostel. The mess is...

reviews.review_heading: JECRC files pros and cons.
reviews.review_text: I like the infrastructure, it's unique, and you'll definitely feel a friendly environment here. The mess food is good, and the classrooms are also good, kind of like a school vibe, but okay. Wi-Fi works fine, but they can still work on it. Sports facilities are quite good. We have volleyball football, cricket, basketball, tennis, badminton, and pickleball courts.

reviews.review_heading: College is good if you are considering a good campus life with decent placements and a good crowd.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good, with good classes and all the available facilities one can look for. There is also a very big and recently opened canteen that has a lot of big fast food brands inside with good seating space. The hostels are also good with triple-sharing rooms.

reviews.review_heading: University life of a student.
reviews.review_text: Labs are air-conditioned, and proper PCs are available for each student. There are two main libraries for books, and students can borrow any book for a 15-day period and then have to return it, otherwise, a fine is to be paid. There's a cafeteria with various outlets that have recently opened, where students can sit and enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements and faculty, with a good environment and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The campus was very large and far from the main city of Hyderabad, with bad transport facilities to the college. College hostels were messy, and the food was not good. Sports facilities were good. Wi-Fi was present but could not be accessed. Labs and classrooms were good.

reviews.review_heading: My overall experience is quite good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, but the speed is average and usable. There are labs for every specific subject. It has well-furnished classrooms. The library has a lot of books. Faculty members in the hostel are quite nice and help with every problem we face. Food is also good because it is managed by the Stanza Living company. Medical facilities are available for 24 hours. Sports facilities are really good. We have grounds and courts for every game.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Rajasthan and one of the best colleges in India. It is worth the money.
reviews.review_text: The department has high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, and access to a central library with good technical resources. Labs are updated regularly. The overall infrastructure is modern and student-friendly. The hostel is decent with clean rooms,  24x7 security, and regular housekeeping. The food quality and canteen are good and hygienic, with multiple food options. The campus has good medical facilities and a health centre. It has a good sports ground for cricket, foot...

reviews.review_heading: Everything works only if you hustle.
reviews.review_text: Fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus with decent internet speed. Classrooms are good. A library with books specially for law students. Mess food is better than average and managed by a hotel management company called Stanza Living, and it also has a cafeteria. 24/7 medical support with ambulance and dispensary. For sports, it has a football ground, cricket ground, tennis court, volleyball court, basketball court and football turf.

reviews.review_heading: The worst placement in private universities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, in fact hostels are also very good and environment of hostel is also very neat and clean. But the main problem is Wi-Fi. Like in classes you will definitely get the network issue and the faculty doesn't provide you the password of the floor Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Great college with good facilities and amazing events.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well maintained with smart boards and benches with electric circuit with free Wi-Fi throughout the college. Every subject has its dedicated lab like Physics Chemistry and Computer programming. There are around 2 fully functioning libraries with proper facilities consisting of books for specialized courses. Hostel and mess facilities are excellent with a proper menu and air conditioned rooms 3 to 4 students in each room with their own partitioned cubicles.

reviews.review_heading: Strong academics - Poor control.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at JECRC University is impressive and student friendly. From spacious classrooms to good campus facilities, everything is well organised. The environment feels positive and supportive for academic purpose. This is a very nice thing of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it was the best university for the MCA course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities at our campus were among my favourite things. Facility had air conditioning in a number of spaces, including the library and classrooms. Wi-Fi was also available at our college. The hostel boasted first-rate amenities and affordable pricing. The cafeteria was nice, stylish, and affordable.

The university is striving to become a benchmark for higher learning education and continuously paving its way to achieve academic, professional, cultural, and social enrichment in the lives of individuals and communities. The educators here are not just professors but guides, mentors, and skilled professionals who came up with quality education at the organisation. The faculty members at JECRC University are fully committed to the success of the students with their adoptive teaching techniques, which is a blend of traditional learning with modern methodologies.

paragraphs: JECRC University offers numerous scholarships to meritorious students across various courses based on academic excellence. The university offers these scholarships in the form of fee waivers. JECRC University scholarships include the eligibility criteria of need-based and sports-based scholarships as well.

The university offers a scholarship bifurcating on the basis of UG, PG, BTech and MBA programme students. The eligibility criteria vary on the basis of Class 12 aggregate/ JEE Main percentile, CAT 2024 percentile score and sports achievements (National and International level). review_summary.college_name: MET Institute of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college. Facilities and infrastructure make it feel real.

content.Placements: The placements of my college, that is MET Institute of Pharmacy, are good, it's more than most of the colleges in Mumbai. The highest package is 25 LPA, and the lowest is around 4.5 LPA, with an average of 6-7 LPA. Top recruiting companies for B.Pharma include Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are very well-equipped. Canteen food is delicious and budget-friendly. There is a library where you can study peacefully. There is a music room where you can sing or listen to music. You can play various games like Chess, Carrom, Table tennis, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfying because of the faculty and good placement.

content.Placements: Production trainers, supervisors, and different roles are offered. Around 70-80% of students from our course were successfully placed in reputed pharmaceutical companies. The highest package offered was around 6 LPA, the lowest was 2.5 LPA, and the average stood at 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies included Cipla, Sun Pharma, Lupin, Wockhardt, and Dr Reddy's Laboratories. Nearly 60% of students received internships in organisations like Cipla, Serum Institute of India, and Glenmark.
content.Infrastructure: The library, lab, and transportation have a big and good campus. The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a rich library that support quality learning and research. Hostel facilities are clean and secure, with good food, medical aid, and sports amenities ensuring student comfort and well-being.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are great, very educated, and experienced.

content.Placements: 75 students are placed in this course. They do not offer package but it has training for 500 hours in hospital or a retail pharmacy. Internship is mandatory for this course, only then final certificate be provided. Students get a great exposure to a pharmacy career.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are clean and up to date equipments. It is very hygienic. Students can conduct practicals efficiently, helping teacher make it easier to handle things like chemicals. Their experience also helps a lot. The lab assistant is highly qualified and has a lot of experience.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: All the staff are good, and the college is also good.

content.Placements: The placement offer is very good, given by the college to the students. The senior teachers also help us to make the right decision for the job placement, and it is very helpful for students. All offers have the best packages given by the placement team.
content.Infrastructure: The pharmacy courses are very good for students who have an interest in the science field. The teaching staff is also very good, and the hostel is very neat and clean in a strict manner. All the students also have good manners in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, good crowd, and well qualified teachers.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies are Wipro and Tata. Out of 70 batches, 30 students got placed and 30 went for further studies. The highest package is 6 lacs and the lowest is 2 lacs. Also, all students get summer internships depending on where they live.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure; we have a music room with all kinds of instruments, an auditorium, a fully equipped library and air-conditioned classrooms. Along with that, we have an excellent canteen for food and a sports room with chess, table tennis and carrom.

admission_process.title: MET Institute of Pharmacy Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: MET Institute of Pharmacy admissionsare open currently. The institute offers seats to candidates via their entrance exam scores or merit. Candidates have to apply on the institute's website for the preferred course. Check below the steps to get a seat in the institute:
1. MET Institute of Pharmacy Application Process 2026
The mode of application is online. Candidates meeting eligibility can fill out the form. Aspirants have to register first to get the login credentials.
2. Selection

Aspirants from Maharashtra State are offered seat via MHT-CET scores in BPharm programme. All India Candidates can get admission based on their non-zero score in MHT-CET or NEET. Admission to DPharm programme is based on merit of the candidates.
3. Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment

The institute informs the candidates about their selection. Shortlisted aspirants have to report at the campus for document verification. Aspirants who are allotted seat have to pay theMET Institute of Pharmacy feesto confirm their seat.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Jagannath Gupta Institute of Medical Sciences and Hospital:

reviews_list.review_title: Dreams to become doctor .

review_content.Placements: Since it is an MBBS degree, placements are mostly based on skill set and recommendations. The hospital has a moderate patient load, so if you are willing, you can develop great skills. Faculty members are really good. They'll try to make you excel and become knowledgeable. There are some very well-known and great doctors who took our lectures.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is actually the best part of our college. Faculty members are great and ensure you study diligently. Hostels are very clean and safe, with a curfew at 10:00 pm. Everything else is pretty good. The food is average, though some days it is very good. Non-vegetarians won’t have much problem. But of course, it’s a hostel, not home, so keep your expectations low.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It's a really good college!

review_content.Placements: After the MBBS there is a 1-year mandatory internship course. It will increase your experience in various fields so that you can choose your post-graduation path. Very efficient hospital which gives you a better opportunity to learn and make your experience stronger.
review_content.Infrastructure: Air-conditioned classrooms. Around 350 people can sit in one lecture room easily. Air-conditioned furnished library with an ample number of standard & review books (both Indian and foreign authors).
