individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a private college in West Bengal.

content.Placements: Every student has to study for the first 4.5 years in the course. It comprises 5.5 years, and the rest 1 year is utilised in internships where every student gets the opportunity to work in the hospital in return for a stipend varying from college to college.
content.Infrastructure: When it comes to the infrastructure part, it is ranked among the best medical colleges in West Bengal. Everything is neat, clean, and well-developed structurally, which attracts outsiders. People love it when they watch the beauty of the campus here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college is very good. They have a beautiful campus.

content.Placements: We are a total 56 students. The highest package in our course is 12 lakh, and the lowest is 9 lakh. Average package is 10 lakh. It is a private college. 100 percent of students can get internships from our course.
content.Infrastructure: The college has its own campus. Lab, classroom, and library are present in our college. Wi-Fi is not available there. Hostel has available rooms. One room for four people. Food is available in the canteen. Medical facilities are available in our college.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful in nature. They are well qualified and knowledgeable. Teaching quality is average. The students are ready for industry. But not fully prepared for industry. The semester exams in my college are quite difficult. All students are passed.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Dreams to become doctor .

content.Placements: Since it is an MBBS degree, placements are mostly based on skill set and recommendations. The hospital has a moderate patient load, so if you are willing, you can develop great skills. Faculty members are really good. They'll try to make you excel and become knowledgeable. There are some very well-known and great doctors who took our lectures.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is actually the best part of our college. Faculty members are great and ensure you study diligently. Hostels are very clean and safe, with a curfew at 10:00 pm. Everything else is pretty good. The food is average, though some days it is very good. Non-vegetarians won’t have much problem. But of course, it’s a hostel, not home, so keep your expectations low.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It's a really good college!

content.Placements: After the MBBS there is a 1-year mandatory internship course. It will increase your experience in various fields so that you can choose your post-graduation path. Very efficient hospital which gives you a better opportunity to learn and make your experience stronger.
content.Infrastructure: Air-conditioned classrooms. Around 350 people can sit in one lecture room easily. Air-conditioned furnished library with an ample number of standard & review books (both Indian and foreign authors). Well-furnished triple-sharing or single-sharing hostel with AC and non-AC available. Food quality is moderate.

Wipro, Reliance, Bajaj, Capgemini, TCS, are to name a few. Highest package offered in BTech has been 10LPA and the lowest package has been 3-5 LPA in year 2022-23. Usha Martin University has a decent placement cell who groom students for interview rounds.

reviews_list.review_title: Good placement support and practical learning, but curriculum and activities need upgrades.

review_content.Placements: Currently pursuing a BCA from Usha Martin University, I’ve found the placement opportunities to be quite promising. Around 70 to 80% of students from our course are placed through campus drives. The highest package offered so far has gone up to 10 LPA, while the average package ranges between 3.5 to 4 LPA. Most of my seniors received packages around 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: As a BCA student at Usha Martin University, I’d say the facilities and infrastructure for our course are quite decent. Our department has well-equipped computer labs with updated systems and internet access. There’s Wi-Fi available across the campus, including in the labs and library, which helps a lot during assignments or project work. The classrooms are spacious and have projectors for smart learning sessions. The university library is also a good resource. It has a wide range of books, journals, and e-resources that we can access for academic use.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Teachers are well-qualified and also knowledgeable.

review_content.Placements: 60-70% of students were placed in good companies, getting jobs ranging from 3.5 LPA to 10 LPA, including Tata, Airtel, Tech Mahindra, Reliance, and others. Almost 80% of students also got internships, mostly with IT companies like Q Spider, Pentagon Space, etc. MBA, BBA, Pharmacy, LL.B., and many more were good courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: Almost all facilities were available, like systems, boards, and AC in the labs, and everything was good in the classrooms with smart boards. In the libraries, almost all books were available. The food quality in the hostel was good, and the taste was also not bad. Sports and medical facilities were also available in our hostel.

admission_overview.college_name: Usha Martin University Admission 2025 (Open): Eligibility, Selection Process, Dates

admission_process.title: Usha Martin University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Usha Martin University admission 2025 is open.Candidates seeking admission can apply online by visiting the official website of UMU. Usha Martin University admission to the majority of courses is merit-based. Candidates seeking admission can apply online by visiting the official website of the college. Usha Martin Universityoffers over31 programmesacross10 streams. The University offers BCA, BBA, B.Com, BA(Hons), BTech, BA LLB, BPT, BPharma, and BA JMC, among others at UG level. At PG level, the university offers MBA, MCA, MA, LLB, LLM. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to full fill the admission criteria set by the college. Given below are more updates related to Usha Martin University admission. course wise eligibility, selection criteria and admission process:

Usha Martin University offers admission to all its UG and PG programmes on the basis of candidates’ performance in the last qualifying examination. Candidates seeking admission to any of the courses can apply both online as well as offline.Usha Martin University coursesalong with their selection criteria are given below:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Class 12 from a state board with Physics, Chemistry and Maths as main subjects
Merit-Based
Class 12 in Science stream from a state board
Merit-based

Merit-based
Class 12 in any stream from a state board
Merit-based
Bachelor’s degree in the relevant discipline from a recognised university
Merit-based
's admission procedure incluUsha Martin Universitydes multiple steps. The admission is conducted in both online and offline mode. Find belowUsha Martin University admission process:
Step 1: Usha Martin University Application Process

Candidates must visit the official website of Usha Martin University to apply online. For the offline mode, candidates can download the admission form for their selected programme from the university website and submit the duly filled forms to the University at the suggested address.
Step 2: Usha Mertin University Shortlisting

Candidates are shortlisted based on candidate's performance in their last qualifying exam and also in the entrance exams. The university also conducts entrance test for few courses and personal interviews for selections.
Step 3: Usha Mertin University Final Admission
Shortlisted candidates must pay the admission fee to finalise their seats in the university.

The program is spread across eighrt semesters that mainly focuses on the properties and impacts of pharmaceutical drugs. Admission is based on the eligibility criteria. Read on to know more about theUsha MArtin University BPharmaprogramme.

faqs.question: What is the cost of BPharma at Usha Martin University?
faqs.answer: The overall cost of BPharma at Usha Martin Univesity is aroundINR 5.4 lakh.The BPharma fees also include multiple components such as exam fees, development fees, caution deposit fees, etc. Candidates must pass class 12 from a state board with 50% aggregate to get admission to the BPharma programme. BPharma selection is merit-based. However, the university does accept CUET scores.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted for BPharma at Usha Martin University?
faqs.answer: Usha Martin University accepts CUET-UG for BPharma and other UG programmes. Candidates are required to clear the entrance exam after the application process is done. Since the CUET-UG results are declared candidates can visit the official website of the university and check their respective cut-offs for the programmes they have applied for. The scorecards will be released after the normalization of scores all test takers as the exam was held on multiple days.

faqs.question: Does Usha Martin University accept JEE Main scores for BTech admission?
faqs.answer: Yes, Usha Martin University accepts JEE Main score for BTech admissions. Moreover, candidates seeking admission to UMU BTech courses must fulfill the eligibility criteria. To be eligible, the students must have passed Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate. In addition to that, the candidate must have studied Physics, Chemistry, Maths as main subjects in Class 12. The further selection of candidates is made based on JEE Main score. The university also accepts CUET scores for its BTech admissio

faqs.question: Is there any seat reservation policy at Usha Martin University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Usha Martin University follows the rules of reservation set by the state of Jharkhand. The reservation policy states that a total of 50% of seats are reserved for SC/ST/OBC category students. A breakdown of this reservation policy is given below:CategoryReservationSC10%ST26%OBC14%General50%Note:The above-mentioned information is taken from an official document released by the university. However, it is subject to change.

courses_data.name: Usha Martin University MBA Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: Usha Martin University offers a two-year MBA programme in a full-time mode. The programme is offered across three specialisations HR, Marketing, and Finance. The MBA programme offers candidates to pursue the course in either one specialisations or dual specialisations. The university also offersMBA in Collaboration with IBMa cutting-edge programme in two specialisation Business Intelligence & Data Analytics. Admission is merit-based as per the last qualifying exam. Read on to know more about theUsha Martin Univesity MBA programme.

faqs.question: Does Usha Martin University offer MBA programme?
faqs.answer: Yes, Usha Martin University does offers MBA programmes. Candidates form any background - including Science, Commerce and Humanities are capable of pursuing the MBA programme. All that is required is a achelor's degree with 50% aggregate from any relevant background. Also, candidates must have a valid score inTSICET/APICET/CAT/XATexams to get shortlisted for the MBA programme.

faqs.question: How do I prepare for the PI round for Usha Martin University MBA admissions?
faqs.answer: Usha Martin University conducts a PI orund for selection of students to its MBA programme. All the registered candidates who meet the eligibility requirements and have a good academic background are invited for the PI round.  Listed below are some of the common questions asked during PIs:Tell me about yourselfDescribe a time when you demonstrated leadershipWhat have you done to improve your skills and knowledge in the last year?Describe a time when you had to overcome hardshipWhat have you learn

faqs.question: Is Usha Martin University good for BTech?
faqs.answer: Usha Martin University (UMU),  Ranchi isan ISO 9001:2015 Certified University.It has been recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Pharmacy Council of India (PCI), and is amember of the Association of Indian Universities (AIU). The University is renowned for its advanced academic resources, well-qualified faculty, and a wide range of extracurricular, cultural, and sports activities. As for the placements, which is the overall good. A total of73 students were placedin leading companies such as SBI Life Insurance, ESAF Small Finance Bank, Vivo, and many others. MBA emerged as thetop departmentwith the highest number of students placed. Further, theUsha Martin Universitythe highest packageoffered during 2023 placements wasINR 10 LPA.

faqs.question: How good is Maharashtra Academy of Naval Education and Training, MIT ADT University in terms of ranking?
faqs.answer: Maharashtra Academy of Naval Education and Training is a new specialised navy academy established in 2018 by MIT ADT University in association with the Indian Navy. While it does not rank among top colleges presently, it has approvals from DG Shipping and AICTE. Its parent MIT ADT University also has low rankings currently. However, the focused naval training and connections with the Navy provide good credibility and prospects. The BTech Marine Engineering programme is the flagship course. Though traditional rankings are low owing to nascency, the niche focus provides potential for future growth and placements in the naval domain.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to D.Pharma at Usha Martin University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who are seeking admission to the UMU DPharma course must ensure that they are eligible to apply in the first place. If eligible, they can fill out the course-specific application form via online or offline mode. The application for the DPharma programme is INR 500.After the application stage is completed, the university will communicate the rest of the admission requirements via mail. Students must follow the steps mentioned in the mail. Those who are offered admission must pay the fees to confirm their seat.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good on the campus.
reviews.review_text: All things on the campus are good. The conditions of the campus are good.

reviews.review_heading: Good for placements and a good infrastructure with all facilities.
reviews.review_text: Given all facilities Wi-Fi, labs, library, and washing machines are available. The quality of the food in canteen is also good. Medical support is also available 24/7, with extracurricular activities on campus like in-ground gym, basketball, badminton courts, volleyball and a great ground for cricket lovers.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement support and practical learning, but curriculum and activities need upgrades.
reviews.review_text: As a BCA student at Usha Martin University, I’d say the facilities and infrastructure for our course are quite decent. Our department has well-equipped computer labs with updated systems and internet access. There’s Wi-Fi available across the campus, including in the labs and library, which helps a lot during assignments or project work. The classrooms are spacious and have projectors for smart learning sessions. The university library is also a good resource. It has a wide range of books, journ...

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are well-qualified and also knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: Almost all facilities were available, like systems, boards, and AC in the labs, and everything was good in the classrooms with smart boards. In the libraries, almost all books were available. The food quality in the hostel was good, and the taste was also not bad. Sports and medical facilities were also available in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Hey, I am Rishav Raj, and I am grateful to write a review about our college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructures are best in our college. Hostel and other things provided. Many types of things that can help to increase more students, and have various types of activities like football stadium also there in our college. The name is Amitabh Choudhary Stadium.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good, and the infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel was good. It had all the facilities, but the mess food taste was not up to the mark. Students couldn’t go out after 7 pm and could only roam inside the campus. The college hostel had many facilities like Wi-Fi, 24/7 electricity, both AC and non-AC rooms for students, and common washrooms, as well as attached washrooms for individual rooms.

reviews.review_heading: UMU: A Gateway of Opportunities.
reviews.review_text: UMU provides labs for practical classes and assignments with the latest technology, along with Wi-Fi and table internet connection. UMU also provides a library containing reference books for particular courses. UMU provides spacious and good-quality classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: About Usha Martin University.
reviews.review_text: All classes have free Wi-Fi access. There are electric slab mechanical labs and a physics lab. All classes are very big and have smart boards in them. The college has a very big and central library that has a vast amount of books, with e-library availability. There is a common cafeteria for all students in the college, which has a large variety of food items.

reviews.review_heading: For the MCA course facilities and faculty is good at this college.
reviews.review_text: Usha Martin University has a well-maintained and well-developed infrastructure for the MCA course. The college provides Wi-Fi throughout the campus for students and also provides labs, a library, and a canteen. The quality of these facilities is very good. The labs have proper systems for students to do their practical work. The college also provides various types of sports facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Usha Marti University Ranchi.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very much provided here, like Wi-Fi is available everywhere, labs are available and well-maintained classrooms are available. The Central Library is present, where all books and journals are. Hostel facilities are very good and rooms and bathrooms are provided. Mess food is also good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: College has satisfactory facilities and qualified faculty for the MCA Course.
reviews.review_text: Students used to get all the necessary facilities, such as computer labs, WiFi, libraries, canteens, classrooms with modern facilities, etc., at this college. All these facilities are of good quality. Infrastructure for the MCA course is also good. Sports and hostel facilities are also available for the interested students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and qualified faculties.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is well designed and beautiful. We have separate hostels for boys and girls and a common mess for all. The classrooms are well designed and organized. The classrooms even have projectors. And even students get access to the Wi-Fi, and also the university is clean.

reviews.review_heading: UMU: A Maverick Journey to Success.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at our college is very impressive, with different blocks of buildings assigned to specific groups of departments for a comfortable flow of classes. Our institution also has library facilities with a good availability of journals and course books, which can be issued anytime on campus through a library card. The canteen is large and offers a wide variety of food, with proper sanitation maintained by the canteen authority. Medical facilities are also available, including an OPD ...

reviews.review_heading: College for a better future.
reviews.review_text: The building and hostel are very well maintained. The college has a clean and friendly environment that promotes happiness. The canteen and mess provide great food for students. Medical facilities in case of any accidents are also available through OPDs.

reviews.review_heading: I never get bored in my college life. Just some ups and downs happen when thinking of placement.
reviews.review_text: If we talk about facilities, they are, like, okay. The summer season feels totally dead as there are no air conditioners in classes; only in labs will you get air conditioning. There is no Wi-Fi for students. Only some classes have a smart board. The library is on the 1st floor, and all types of books are available for your course-related needs. I don't opt for hostels, so I don't know anything about them, but yeah, there are water problems during summer and the food is also not too good. The ca...

college_info.intro:
DY Patil University Pune consist of 7 schools, including the Architecture, Design, Engineering and Technology, and others. The University provides UG, PG, Diploma and PhD programmes. The MBA programme is one of the most popular offerings at DY Patil Medical University Pune. The university offers a two-year, full-time MBA programme in the following specialisations:
DY Patil University Pune is also known for its BTech programme offered in various specialisations such as Computer Engineering, Information Technology, Industrial Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, among others. The Project Based Learning Approach (PBL) followed by the university helps students build a strong foundation in theoretical and practical aspects of technology. DY Patil Vidyapeeth Pune regularly organises various Technical & Professional Skill Enhancement Workshops, guest lectures, and live projects to enhance the employability skills of the students. review_summary.college_name: DY Patil University Pune Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Excellent and beautiful campus, with the best facilities. Placement needs improvement.

content.Placements: 65% of students are placed during the latest placement season. The recruiting companies are Adobe, Atlassian, TCS, Infosys, Deloitte, Amazon, Microsoft, and Google. The average package is 12.2 LPA. The top roles offered are software development, data science intern, machine learning intern, and web development intern.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-equipped labs specific to the course, such as regular lab upgrades are done based on industry needs. There are ML, IoT, Robotics, and Embedded Systems labs, with high-performance systems and licensed software. The college hostel rooms are good, and it is a beautiful campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The campus is awesome, and the faculty is good, but the only thing is that placement is not good.

content.Placements: In my college, out of 600 students, only 50-60 students get placements. The students who have a 9+ CGPA have been placed. The highest package is 12 LPA and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. The roles offered by the course are Developer, Data Analyst, Data Scientist, ML Engineer, etc. Up to 90% have gotten an internship on the Edu Skills platform.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the best. Entire campus have Wi-Fi networks, and labs are the best. Classrooms are also the best, and the library is average. The hostel is the best, but it is very costly. The quality of food available in the mess is good, and medical facilities are average. In sports, the university has a separate academy. The university's cricket ground hosts leagues like the Vijay Trophy, DY Patil Trophy, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is nicely maintained, but it can also be more upgraded in various fields.

content.Placements: The college has average placement and offers. The Corporate Relations and Career Services Cell, i.e., the T and P Cell, works hard to bring companies to the campus. They try to bring in more start-up companies, which makes it easier for students to get placed. The average placement CTC offered is 6–7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure provided to students is quite good. Our college has multiple labs set up for students to study, which helps them grow their skills and gain experience in their particular domain. The hostel facilities are also available for students, located near the college only.

individual_reviews.title: The campus is so peaceful.

content.Placements: I am a B.Des. in Graphic Design first-year student from D Y Patil University, Pune. There is no specific package to tell. It is all based on our skills, how we create it, and gain knowledge from it. Companies will hire us on the basis of our skills.
content.Infrastructure: The college has facilities like Wi-Fi, a good ambience, and tables according to our department, which are comfortable, so we can work properly. The hostel has Wi-Fi and a mess facility. The food in our mess is good. We do have other food items.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Graphic Design - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I love the campus, and it has the greenery.

content.Placements: I am a first-year B.Des student at DY Patil University. Placements are always based on our skills, but the college provides a lot of guidance to us. They offer plenty of skills and resources, so by the last year, we are fully prepared for placements with skills.
content.Infrastructure: The college is nice. We have a library, computer lab, and a workshop for working on models. The classrooms are well infrastructure, and the tables are according to the work, so they are comfortable. Both the hostel and the college have Wi-Fi. The food is good.

admission_overview.college_name: DY Patil University Pune Admission 2025: Fee, Dates, Eligibility & Selection, Application

admission_process.title: DY Patil University Pune Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: DY Patil University Pune admissionsare primarilyentrance-based. The university accepts national or state-level entrance exams such as NATA,MHT-CET, CMAT, MAH CET, etc. for admission to specific courses. The university also conductsDYPCETfor admission to some of the courses such asBBA, MBA, etc. DYPU Pune offers a wide range of UG, PG, and doctoral programmes to students acrossEngineering, Management, and Science, among others.DY Patil Puneoffers courses through seven schools. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website of the university.

DY Patil University Pune is currently accepting applications for all courses. All the programmes are offered in full-time mode at UG, PG and doctoral levels. Below are keyDY Patil Pune admissionhighlights:
Particulars
DY Patil Pune Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
How to apply?
https://dypatiluniversitypune.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
UG, PG and Doctoral
Popular programmes
BTech | MBA
DY Patil University Pune Brochure

DY Patil Pune admission 2025is based on entrance exam scores for most of the courses. Candidates also need to fulfil course-specific eligibility to apply for a course in DYPU. Given below is the list of some of the popularDY Patil Pune coursesalong with their selection and eligibility criteria:
Bachelor's degree with a minimum aggregate of 50%
MAT/CAT/XAT/GMAT/CMAT/ATMA/MAH CET/DYPCET+ WAT + PI
Class 12 or equivalent withPhysics, Mathematics and Chemistry/Biology/ Computer Science with at least 45% aggregate
Diploma after Class 12 with Mathematics as a compulsory subject with at least 45% aggregate
NATA/ Other Competitive Exam
Class 12 in relevant subjects with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved categories) or
BSc degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for Backward Class categories and Persons with Disabilities from Maharashtra state)
JEE Main/MHT CET/PERA CET
MHT CET/NEET
HSc or equivalent withEnglishas a compulsory subject with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for Backward Class categories and Persons with Disabilities from Maharashtra state)
Check otherDYPU Pune Courses

All the candidates seeking admission to DYPU, need to appear in an entrance test to secure a seat in their desired course. The seat intake varies depending on the programme. Programmes such as BArch have a very limited intake while a large number of students can be admitted to the BTech programme at DY Patil University. The table below shows the number of seats available for some of the courses at DY Patil University:
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The university offers admission both on an entrance and merit basis. Candidates have to get through all the selection rounds of the respective course to get a seat. The admission process involves application form filling and a selection process followed by counselling or an interview (for some courses). Below is the step-wiseDY Patil University Pune admission process:
STEP 1: DY Patil Pune Application Process 2025

The DY Patil Pune application process is carried out in online mode. Thus, aspirants can apply by visiting the official website of the university. The application process involves online registration, form filling, document upload, and fee payment. Candidates need to pay an application fee ofINR 800for UG and diploma courses. The application fee for PG programmes isINR 1,000.
STEP 2: Selection Process

DY Patil Pune accepts entrance exam scores for admission to most of the courses. The university accepts MHT CET, JEE Main, UCEED, NEET, etc. for admission to specific programmes. For UG, the candidates also need to qualify for Class 12. For PG courses, graduation in the relevant discipline is required. Candidates with the minimum qualifications will be eligible for admission. For the MBA, the university also calls candidates for the Written Ability Test and PI round.
STEP 3: Fee Payment & Admission Confirmation

The university releases a course-wise merit list on the official website of DY Patil Pune. Candidates who make it to the final selection list or are selected after counselling can pay the required amount of fee to confirm their seat. Also, the selected candidates have to submit specified documents for verification.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for the BTech course at D Y Patil University Pune?
faqs.answer: Candidates must pass Class 12 in relevant subjects with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved categories) to apply for BTech programme. Aspirants who have completed BSc degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for Backward Class categories and Persons with Disabilities from Maharashtra state) can also apply.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BTech in D Y Patil University Pune?
faqs.answer: DY Patil University Pune considers JEE Main or MHT CET score for admission to BTech courses. Besides, candidates must also complete Class 12 or equivalent with Physics, Mathematics and Chemistry/ Biology/ Computer Science with at least 45% aggregate to apply for BTech course. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

placement_data.title: DY Patil University Pune Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per the official data available, the highest package offered during DY Patil University Pune placements in recent past stood at INR 12 LPA . In addition, 100% internship offers were made and more than 500 companies visited the campus during DY Patil University Pune placements 2024.

According to the School of Management brochure, the average package offered during Management placements in recent past stood at INR 4.8 LPA . 100% internship was provided as well to Management students during the recent placement drive.

The University has a placement cell known by the name of Office of Career Services . The University has also established two platforms , namely CIAP (Centre for Industry and Academia Partnerships) and Centre for Excellence KRITI to promote innovation-driven environment at the campus. These two platforms are designed to act as a bridge between the University and companies with the objective of developing future skills, research work and final placement drives.

hostel_campus.college_name: DY Patil University Pune Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
D Y Patil University is residential campus. Accommodation is made available in three separate building in the campus for boys and girls, and has 1000+ capacity. For the food, campus has Legend Café managed by professional agency to cater the vegetarian and non-vegetarian food.  Hostel accommodation is allotted to students on First Cum First Service basis during the first year. The occupancy is single bed /double bed and triple bed and allotted to the students as per the availability.
It has the best accommodation facilities for boys and girl students. Campus provides students with modern and comfortable hostel facilities, catering to diverse needs and interests. Students have the flexibility to choose between twin-sharing and triple-sharing rooms, each furnished with unlimited high-speed Wi-Fi and regular housekeeping services. For the safety of students is a top priority, with full-time wardens, CCTV monitoring, and biometric entry enabled at security gate.

library.description: D Y Patil University library has a collection of 75000+ books . Library has the spacious reading hall and Libraries are equipped with books, journals, E Resources & Data bases. The library e-resources: JGATE, IEEE, Springer with plagiarism software.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis, Carrom, Volleyball Courts

reviews.review_heading: Excellent and beautiful campus, with the best facilities. Placement needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-equipped labs specific to the course, such as regular lab upgrades are done based on industry needs. There are ML, IoT, Robotics, and Embedded Systems labs, with high-performance systems and licensed software.  The college hostel rooms are good, and it is a beautiful campus.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is awesome, and the faculty is good, but the only thing is that placement is not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best. Entire campus  have Wi-Fi networks, and labs are the best. Classrooms are also the best, and the library is average. The hostel is the best, but it is very costly. The quality of food available in the mess is good, and medical facilities are average. In sports, the university has a separate academy. The university's cricket ground hosts leagues like the Vijay Trophy, DY Patil Trophy, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The college is nicely maintained, but it can also be more upgraded in various fields.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided to students is quite good. Our college has multiple labs set up for students to study, which helps them grow their skills and gain experience in their particular domain. The hostel facilities are also available for students, located near the college only.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is so peaceful.
reviews.review_text: The college has facilities like Wi-Fi, a good ambience, and tables according to our department, which are comfortable, so we can work properly. The hostel has Wi-Fi and a mess facility. The food in our mess is good. We do have other food items.

reviews.review_heading: I love the campus, and it has the greenery.
reviews.review_text: The college is nice. We have a library, computer lab, and a workshop for working on models. The classrooms are well infrastructure, and the tables are according to the work, so they are comfortable. Both the hostel and the college have Wi-Fi. The food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Worth the Money and Average Placements.
reviews.review_text: Now, this is the good part, the hostel is good, and the mess facilities are decent at best. The workshop has all the basic equipment, but items used, like wood and thermocol, have to be supplied by students themselves, along with the additional cost and travel and arranging transport to bring them to the college workshop.

reviews.review_heading: A single floor college.
reviews.review_text: Food in canteen is decent, a bit pricey but okay. The hostel is strict and doesn't allow students to go out after 7:00 PM, forcing students to use canteen food for dinner that way. The area around the hostel is bad, crime rates are at the highest, and transport issues are there as it's in the middle of nowhere.

reviews.review_heading: Review for D. Y Patil University, Ambi, Pune.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi services are available full-time, and electricity backup is also there along with an abundant water supply. The hostel has three types of rooms single, double, and triple. Water coolers are placed on every floor in each building. Washing machines are available in hostels. There are two types of hostels old and new.

reviews.review_heading: If you have no option left and you think that you can study on your own. But, just need a degree.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, there's no doubt they have massive buildings. There are a total of 5 buildings, and all are above 7 floors. Classrooms are pretty huge, and they have a professional cricket ground. However, they lack auditoriums. The one we have is super small.

reviews.review_heading: I am not so satisfied with faculty members, and placements are not there.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and campus are pretty good and well-maintained. Wi-Fi facility is available, and there is a library and canteen are available. The infrastructure for the course is decent, not good, but there are huge spacious classrooms with proper ventilation and sunlight. However, desks are not good, and the seating is not proper. There is no proper management, no computer labs, and no proper facilities. However, the college has a cricket stadium, which is one of the biggest.

reviews.review_heading: Dr. D. Y. Patil College, Pune - Good campus and teachers, strong industry tries.
reviews.review_text: I like the atmosphere of our college because of the greenery and refreshing air with multiple buildings and spacious too. Lack of faculty members according to the fees we pay for our college. Management is not good and should take initiatives properly and responsibly. I hope they take our feedback properly also and are properly maintained. We take a lot of effort to complete it with sleepless nights. But still, our assignments are not given that much value for the efforts we have made, thank you...

reviews.review_heading: A transformative college experience with strong academic and professional campus life.
reviews.review_text: Departments are offered well-equipped design studio, CAD labs, model making workshop, high-speed Wi-Fi, good library, and smart classroom. The library is stocked with design journals, books, and resources. Hostel facilities are clean, secure, and comfortable offering a peaceful environment for students. The mess provides hygienic food with decent variety. The canteen provides additional snacks. Medical facilities are provided on campus. Sports facilities are provided for both indoor and outdoor ...

reviews.review_heading: A transformative college experience with strong academics and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are provided. Hostel is well maintained, but has a few restrictions. Canteen food is pretty good. Sports and games I am not really interested.

reviews.review_heading: Recommendations for a good architecture college.
reviews.review_text: New hostel block is completely good with all sorts of modern equipments. The cleaning and maintenance of the hostel is done well. There are options to choose from single, double, and triple sharing rooms. Wi-Fi and laundry facilities are also available at the hostel here.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and campus worth it.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities like well-equipped Wi-Fi, library, many sports events keep happening, with good cricket ground, basketball court, football, and volleyball also. It has good canteen services with hygienic food. Good toilets are there. The campus is always clean.

college_info.college_name: DY Patil University Pune

data.description: Yes, D Y Patil University Pune offers separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. The hostel has 167 rooms for girls and 160 rooms for boys. There is a separate bathroom in all types of rooms. Water supply and generators are provided to each building to ensure 24*7 uninterrupted power supply. The canteen at DY Patil University is spacious with modern furniture and provides traditional food of various tastes from various states of India at a reasonable price. It serves snacks, beverages, breakfast, lunch, and dinner at a charge.

highlights.summary: The NEET PG 2026 exam date has been set as Aug 30, 2026 (tentatively) for admission to the MD, MS, and PG Diploma courses.

placements.overview:
Founded in 2008, Indian Institute of Public Health - Gandhinagar is a private university. It is located in Gandhinagar, Gujarat. Indian Institute of Public Health - Gandhinagar provides PG, Certificate and Doctorate courses in both Full Time and Part Time modes. It provides 22 courses across specialisations such as Dermatology, HealthCare & Hospital, Hospital / Healthcare Management and Public Health. Some of the courses offered at this institute include M.Sc., PG Diploma, Ph.D., MHA and MPH. Indian Institute of Public Health - Gandhinagar fees ranges between INR 5,000 to 5,50,000. The student intake for these courses is 520. Indian Institute of Public Health - Gandhinagar offers these course across fields such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and Humanities & Social Sciences. The median salary offered to students is INR 4,80,000. Indian Institute of Public Health - Gandhinagar offers all the campus facilities to students.

Q. How many courses are offered by IIPH Gandhinagar?

reviews_list.batch_info: Masters in Public Health (MPH) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is India's first public health university, and the fee structure is high.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of students are placed every year. The maximum salary package offered is 12 LPA in the previous year. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies include World Health Organisation i.e WHO, UNICEF, National Health Mission i.e NHM, Jhpiego, etc. Around 100% of students get their internships across India and even abroad. Public health professionals are at the top level which is offered at the Indian Institute of Public Health Gandhinagar.
review_content.Infrastructure: It provides access to Wi-Fi for an internet connection. The library where lots of reading resources are available, classrooms are well-equipped with projectors, lights, enough ventilation, air-conditioner, etc. It has an auditorium and amphitheater at our campus where students have open theatre. The quality of facilities that are being provided is very good from washrooms to everything which is necessary.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master in Hospital Administration (MHA) - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: best three years of my life

review_content.Placements: This college has a very high rate of placement. In my year of graduation, we all had 4 to 5 job letters even before our 6th semester. It's not only the academically top students get placed. Everyone gets placed according to their performance, skill set, and technical know-how. Throughout the 3 years of college the placement agenda is so aggressively to get fit into the brain of the students by the faculties. So till the time, the companies come to recruit. Its like walk in the park for the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Best faculties. Best practical lab. Good food in the canteen, unlike any other college, so all the surrounding college like IT, DENTAL, B PHARMA come and have food in our canteen. Best library with all facilities. Books of every possible writer is available. Since this course is pretty new compared to others so finding something like Genesis that engineers have is never an option. But here the library will guide you for those options. The computer lab is well equipped with the rightful number of computers with a super-fast internet connection. The practical labs are quiet big to accommodate a batch without leaping on each other to see a demonstration by the faculty.

individual_reviews.title: It is India's first public health university, and the fee structure is high.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students are placed every year. The maximum salary package offered is 12 LPA in the previous year. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies include World Health Organisation i.e WHO, UNICEF, National Health Mission i.e NHM, Jhpiego, etc. Around 100% of students get their internships across India and even abroad. Public health professionals are at the top level which is offered at the Indian Institute of Public Health Gandhinagar.
content.Infrastructure: It provides access to Wi-Fi for an internet connection. The library where lots of reading resources are available, classrooms are well-equipped with projectors, lights, enough ventilation, air-conditioner, etc. It has an auditorium and amphitheater at our campus where students have open theatre. The quality of facilities that are being provided is very good from washrooms to everything which is necessary.

admission_overview.title: Indian Institute of Public Health - Gandhinagar Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Indian Institute of Public Health - Gandhinagar admission is a blend of both merit and entrance-based. Students are offered several courses in the field of Public Health. Some of the offered courses include MPH, PG Diploma, and various other short-term courses. The application process for the college mainly commences online. Indian Institute of Public Health - Gandhinagar, also known as IIPH-Gandhinagar, accepts students based on academic merit for most of its courses; however, valid NEET/ AYUSH scores are taken into consideration for the shortlisting of the PG Diploma in Public Health Management course. The college is an integral part of the Public Health Foundation of India (PHFI). Read the following article to learn all about the college's courses and their respective admission criteria and procedures.

eligibility_selection.title: Indian Institute of Public Health - Gandhinagar Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Indian Institute of Public Health - Gandhinagar course admission is made on the basis of the preset admission criteria. Students must be eligible before applying. The criteria for each course differs. The institute conducts personal interview, screening and other rounds. For programmes, such as PGDPHM, students need to submit a valid score obtained in the accepted entrance test. Check out the criteria given below for Indian Institute of Public Health - Gandhinagar courses: Selection Criteria

college_info.college_name: Hind Institute of Medical Sciences, Barabanki: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Hind Institute of Medical Sciences, Barabanki:

college_info.intro:
Hind Institute of Medical Sciences offers courses in the streams of Nursing and Medicine and Health Sciences. The popular programme at HIMS Barabanki is Bachelor of Medicine, Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS).
The average tuition fee for MBBS at HIMS is INR 52.7 L. The eligibility criteria are Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology as the main subjects. The minimum aggregate in Class 12 is 50% for General candidates, along with a valid NEET UG score.

faqs.answer: A:    Hind Institute of Medical Sciences offers admission to the college solely based on the merit acquired in Class 12 and the merit acquired in the entrance exam. In order to get admission to HIMS Barabanki, candidates must have secured the specified minimum aggregate in Class 12. Hence, Class 12 marks are required but not enough to secure admission at HIMS Barabanki. Candidates must also have appeared in the required entrance exam.
faqs.question: Is Class 12 marks enough for Hind Institute of Medical Sciences?

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College review about the infrastructure and campus.

review_content.Placements: There are 100 students in the batch, and out of more than 80 students are placed. Many go for NEET PG preparation and then opt for PG branches. Some also pursue super specialty branches after PG, while others go to foreign countries like the USA, UK, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good, and the labs are well-equipped with new machines and equipment. Hospital infrastructure is also good. However, due to ongoing construction work on campus, the area is quite dusty, and hostel rooms are not very spacious.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Great for academics, fests are conducted once a year.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement cell; only internships are available as this is a medical college. The college has its own hospital with a good patient flow and 24/7 emergency. There are clinical postings and the internship falls under the category of paid internship. The college has an ongoing project to build a super specialty hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms and academic block are nice, but the hostels are subpar and need a complete makeover. The college does provide a free minute renovation once a year, which helps a little. The campus still has a few developing buildings, including a cardiac center and a new cancer hospital.

overview_faqs.question: Can Hind Institute of Medical Sciences, Barabanki be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Hind Institute of Medical Sciences, Barabanki is a distinguished institution offering MD, MS, ANM, D.Pharma, MBBS. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Nursing, Medicine & Health Sciences field. Hind Institute of Medical Sciences, Barabanki is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Hind Institute of Medical Sciences, Barabanki has received an impressive review rating of 4.35 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 4.5 for Campus Life, 4.25 for Placements, 4.5 for Faculty, and 4.5 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: HIMS Barabanki Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with my college and I'll highly recommend it to everyone.

content.Placements: My college lies in an urban area. It has a healthy patient rush which gives us greater opportunity to learn and practice. We've very helpful faculty and staff there. It's a 4.5-year program with 1 year of internship. I feel blessed to be here in this college.
content.Infrastructure: The mess is clean and provides us with healthy food with better quality. The mess has fresh salad and fruits. We get proper hygienic food 4 times a day. The canteen is also clean and hygienic. Medical facilities are excellent which gives a better understanding. Sports areas are given for refreshment during boring or sad days.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of my college experience.

content.Placements: MBBS students need no placements. They can work in each and every part of the country. Students, after doing an MBBS, earn around 90k to 1 lakh easily in their first working years. All the students have to go through a rigorous internship course of 1 year with lots of practice.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure. Can be better with a bit of cleaning. Otherwise, it is quite good, with greenery everywhere and good, spacious, and clean classrooms, mess, and canteens. There are three canteens with hygienic food present 24/7. There are fields for sports activities and a gym as well.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College review about the infrastructure and campus.

content.Placements: There are 100 students in the batch, and out of more than 80 students are placed. Many go for NEET PG preparation and then opt for PG branches. Some also pursue super specialty branches after PG, while others go to foreign countries like the USA, UK, etc.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good, and the labs are well-equipped with new machines and equipment. Hospital infrastructure is also good. However, due to ongoing construction work on campus, the area is quite dusty, and hostel rooms are not very spacious.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great for academics, fests are conducted once a year.

content.Placements: There is no placement cell; only internships are available as this is a medical college. The college has its own hospital with a good patient flow and 24/7 emergency. There are clinical postings and the internship falls under the category of paid internship. The college has an ongoing project to build a super specialty hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms and academic block are nice, but the hostels are subpar and need a complete makeover. The college does provide a free minute renovation once a year, which helps a little. The campus still has a few developing buildings, including a cardiac center and a new cancer hospital.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is a good college.

content.Placements: There are a hundred students in each batch of this course, though there are chances that the number of seats may further increase. After the undergraduate course of MBBS, students need to qualify in the PG course. For this, they need to crack NEET PG, which decides the package offered.
content.Infrastructure: Various facilities like Wi-Fi, library, and gym are available for the students. The labs are well-equipped, and the classrooms are also good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is average, and the food quality in the mess is just fine. Sports and games are also encouraged here.

faqs.question: How to apply for MBBS at Hind Institute of Medical Sciences?
faqs.answer: The Hind Institute of Medical Sciences application process takes place online. The application process is explained in the following steps:Step 1: Apply for the NEET entrance exam on the official website of NTA NEET.Step 2: Appear for the entrance exam, followed by the Counselling and seat allotment round.Step 3: Pay the admission fee and confirm your seat.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at Hind Institute of Medical Sciences?
faqs.answer: Hind Institute of Medical Sciences offers admission based on the merit acquired in the last qualifying exam, along with valid entrance scores. In order to secure admission to HIMS Barabanki, candidates must fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria. Candidates must have qualified Class 12 from any recognised national or state board, and appear for the specified entrance exam. Candidates can apply to the desired course online on the institute's website.

faqs.question: Can I get into Hind Institute of Medical Sciences with 85%?
faqs.answer: Hind Institute of Medical Sciences offers admission solely on the basis of the merit acquired in the qualifying exam, and the scores obtained in the entrance exam. However, the college has specified a minimum aggregate of 50% in Class 12. Candidates with 85% typically have a decent chance at securing admission to the institute.

faqs.question: Is Class 12 marks enough for Hind Institute of Medical Sciences?
faqs.answer: Hind Institute of Medical Sciences offers admission to the college solely based on the merit acquired in Class 12 and the merit acquired in the entrance exam. In order to get admission to HIMS Barabanki, candidates must have secured the specified minimum aggregate in Class 12. Hence, Class 12 marks are required but not enough to secure admission at HIMS Barabanki. Candidates must also have appeared in the required entrance exam.

hostel_campus.college_name: HIMS Barabanki Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my college and I'll highly recommend it to everyone.
reviews.review_text: The mess is clean and provides us with healthy food with better quality. The mess has fresh salad and fruits. We get proper hygienic food 4 times a day. The canteen is also clean and hygienic. Medical facilities are excellent which gives a better understanding. Sports areas are given for refreshment during boring or sad days.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my college experience.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure. Can be better with a bit of cleaning. Otherwise, it is quite good, with greenery everywhere and good, spacious, and clean classrooms, mess, and canteens. There are three canteens with hygienic food present 24/7. There are fields for sports activities and a gym as well.

reviews.review_heading: College review about the infrastructure and campus.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good, and the labs are well-equipped with new machines and equipment.  Hospital infrastructure is also good. However, due to ongoing construction work on campus, the area is quite dusty, and hostel rooms are not very spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Great for academics, fests are conducted once a year.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and academic block are nice, but the hostels are subpar and need a complete makeover. The college does provide a free minute renovation once a year, which helps a little. The campus still has a few developing buildings, including a cardiac center and a new cancer hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college.
reviews.review_text: Various facilities like Wi-Fi, library, and gym are available for the students. The labs are well-equipped, and the classrooms are also good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is average, and the food quality in the mess is just fine. Sports and games are also encouraged here.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with this institution .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good compared to other institutions. Here, a trauma center is available, a cancer institute has recently started, and a cardiac center is currently under construction. Libraries are provided. Smart lecture theaters are available for better understanding. Separate hostels are provided for UGs and PGs. The mess is located in the hostel itself, and the food quality is good enough.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hind Institute of Medical Sciences, Barabanki.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and they are working on canteens. But the hostel and canteen infrastructure are good, but the food is not good. As time spends students get annoyed by their food quality, but they are working on it, and the new management is taking care of it.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure, teachers and the environment of our college are good.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are provided in our college like a hostel with Wi-Fi, and the quality of hostel food is good. There are laboratories, air-conditioned classrooms, 2 libraries and a central library in which all books related to our courses are provided. There is an exit library in which we can bring our own books and study. All medical facilities are available in our college. Students can play various games like basketball, football, badminton and indoor games like table tennis, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hind Institute of Medical Sciences, Barabanki.
reviews.review_text: The food facility is good. There is a good environment on the college campus. All facilities provided in the college are very good. There is a big ground in which several games are played in the college. Sports event is organised.

reviews.review_heading: So I am satisfied with teaching but not with infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college campus is not that good but it's under development. Wi-Fi availability is not that good in library but library has Air conditioner and cooler and proper aeration also. The washrooms seriously need to be improved ans cleaned well. Mess food is not that good but still ok ok. Sports and games ground is available.

reviews.review_heading: Best private college in UP
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is good but it can be improved a bit.. hostel is like ok ok u can live here bit is not as lavish as other private colleges but it's good atleast you can stay here.
Labs and the lecture halls are good. We have canteens cafes in our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of best faculty and teaching with proper lab classes and practice
reviews.review_text: Labs are well equipped with all the required instruments and spacious along with proper guidance of teachers and lab incharges and weekly we perform experiments in labs and we do practice as well before our exams and very often viva is taken to test ourselves for improvement

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Laboratory was very good in our college. Classrooms were average, and they also provided a clean library. There were many books and study materials in the library. Canteen was also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college, and I am fully satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is pretty good. Our college has Wi-Fi, and there is a library available for everyone. The hostel warden is very good in nature and takes care of us. Food quality is average, and medical faculties are top level.

reviews.review_heading: College is developing and we are happy to be here.
reviews.review_text: College provides all basic facilities such as Wi-Fi, library, and lab equipment. The mess food is better as compared to other colleges. Proper hygiene is maintained. Hostel might be a little disappointing in terms of infrastructure but it has really good environment.

college_info.intro:
Tamil Nadu Open University, Chennai, offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses across various streams such as Humanities and Social Sciences, Business and Management Studies, Accounting and Commerce, and so on. TNOU is popularly known for its MBA programme and followed by BA programmes.
The university offers a two-year MBA programme. MBA students can seek higher education and work as Finance Managers, Business Analysts, Compliance Analysts, Investment Bankers, Market Research Analysts, and others. The Tamil Nadu Open University offers BA specialisation in various fields such as English, Political Studies, History, Sociology, Economics, Human Rights, and others. After BA students opt for higher studies or work in various fields as per their specialisations. Below are some of the programmes offered by Tamil Nadu Open University courses fee structure:

faqs.question: Does TNOU have a placement cell?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the annual report for the year 2023,  291 graduates received offer letters. A total of 30,594 students participated and 5,235 were offered job opportunities. The TNOU MBA average package ranged between INR 2.50 LPA and INR 3.50 LPA. faqs.answer: A:    TNOU offers one or two years diploma. Candidates must pass Class 10 to apply for diploma. The university selects candidates for this course based on the aspirant's qualifying exam scores.
faqs.question: What is the duration of Diploma courses at TNOU?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who get admission to Tamil Nadu Open University BSc are required to pay the TNOU BSc fees which range between INR 15,600 and INR 22,000 depending upon the specialisation selected by candidates.Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
faqs.question: What is the Tamil Nadu Open University fee for BSc?

faqs.answer: A:    Tamil Nadu Open University offers both B.Ed and B.Ed Spl.Ed. for two-year each. Below is the minimum academic qualification required to apply for any of the programmes:Aspirants must pass bachelor's or master's degree in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregate to apply for TNOU B.Ed and B.Ed Spl.Ed. programme.Candidates with bachelor's in Engineering or Technology with specialisation in Science and Mathematics with a minimum of 55% aggregate can also apply.There is relaxation in the aggregate for reserved category candidates. Aspirants belonging to BC/ BCM need 45% aggregate, 43% for MBC/ DNC and 40% for SC/ SCA/ ST in graduation.

review_content.Placements: Our St. Peter's College is well known for its high percentage of placement, i.e., 67%. More than 32k+ students are successfully placed in large-scale companies. The highest package offered is 34 lacs per year and the lowest package is 12 lacs per year with top recruiting companies like Indo, Amazon, IFB and TCS.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in 2024 and every good infrastructure

content.Placements: About 250 students are placed in our course, with a minority of 70 males, while the rest are females. The package I chose covered all the basic necessities, dorm, and it cost around 1.5 lakhs. Many of my seniors have gotten good positions in companies, and the placement is very advantageous.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are well-rounded and equipped with good basic equipment. I can easily use the facilities, and all the classrooms have air conditioning, with large blackboards. The Wi-Fi in the dorms is not quite good, but the library is a great alternative.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good College with best facilities.

content.Placements: College is best for Placements compared to other Colleges from our batch 2020. 59% students got best offers from the top companies. The highest package offer from my course is 16 Lacs and the lowest package offered is 4 Lacs. The students got big offer Internships from big companies.
content.Infrastructure: The department is well-equipped with quality labs. Smart classrooms are there. In hostels, rooms are given on a shared basis with the facility of Wi-Fi. There is also a mess and a canteen for Vegetarian and non vegetarian food. A medical facility is also there in emergency times.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) (Part Time) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Recruiting companies are more valuable in college.

content.Placements: Our St. Peter's College is well known for its high percentage of placement, i.e., 67%. More than 32k+ students are successfully placed in large-scale companies. The highest package offered is 34 lacs per year and the lowest package is 12 lacs per year with top recruiting companies like Indo, Amazon, IFB and TCS.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are high-speed Wi-Fi in classrooms for resource download purposes, campus placements with high salaries, classrooms with large spaces, and a large library with a large number of books. Top-notch medical facilities are there, and sports and games are conducted like cricket, volleyball, and football.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is awesome to learn a great number of good things.

content.Placements: About 80% of the students from our course got placed in in the top-most companies. The average salary offered ranges between Rs. 15,000-25,000 per month. About 40% of the students from our course got an internship.

admission_overview.college_name: TNOU Admission 2025: Courses, Dates, Application & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: TNOU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: TNOU admissionsare primarily merit-based. The university conducts entrance exam for some of the courses.Tamil Nadu Open University (TNOU)offers a plethora of UG, PG, Doctoral, Diploma, Vocational Diploma, and Certificate courses. The university also offers courses that can be pursued after Class 10. Some of the popular courses offered by TNOU are BCA, BA, BBA, BCom, MA, MSc, MBA, etc. Candidates can apply online forTNOU admission. In addition, the university has set up 12 regional centres throughout Tamil Nadu to assist students in the application process.

Tamil Nadu Open University offers courses at UG, PG, doctoral and diploma levels. The university offers courses in full-time distance education mode. Candidates are required to apply online for their preferred course. Below areTamil Nadu Open University admissionhighlights:
Particulars
TNOU Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
UG courses:INR 3,000 - INR 28,100
PG courses:INR 3,400 - INR 1 lakh
How to apply?
https://tnou.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Tamil Nadu Open University admissionsare mostly based on merit. Candidates need to complete Class 12 for UG courses whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. The university conducts an entrance test for admission to B.Ed (Spl.Edu.), MPhil and PhD courses. For all other courses, selection is merit-based. Find below the topTNOU coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Bachelor's or master's degree in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregate
Bachelor's in Engineering or Technology with specialisation in Science and Mathematics with a minimum of 55% aggregate

Tamil Nadu Open University fees include multiple components, such as the tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Caution fee is one-time payable at the time of admission. Furthermore, a 100% fee concession is given to jail inmates, transgenders, and destitute windows students. But the convocation fee has to be paid. Additionally, the students joining any course in Tamil medium are eligible for a 10% concession on tuition fees. Find belowTNOU feefor popular courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

TNOU seat intake varies course-wise. Candidates can get a seat in their preferred course based on their merit. The university also provides reservations in seats for certain categories. Below is the seat intake for TNOU courses:
Tamil Nadu Open University reserves some percentage of seats for reserved category candidates. Below is the reservation policy followed at TNOU:

Tamil Nadu Open University admissioncycle begins inJanuary. Candidates are required to first fill out the application form for the preferred course. The selection to most of the courses is merit-based. Below is the step-wiseTNOU admissionprocess:
STEP 1: TNOU Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to fill out the application form online for most of the courses. For B.Ed, aspirants can download the form and submit it along with a DD. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 500 for B.Ed.
STEP 2: Selection

Tamil Nadu Open University selects candidates for most of the course based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. For B.Ed Spl.Ed., MPhil and PhD courses, candidates have to appear for an entrance exam conducted by the university. TNOU releases a rank list to announce the names of the shortlisted candidates.
STEP 3: Admission Counselling

Selected candidates need to participate in the admission counselling. During the counselling, candidates are allotted learner support centres. While coming for admission counselling, aspirants are required to bring admission fee in the form of DD. Candidates also need to bring their documents for verification.
For more details about admission process ofTamil Nadu Open University check out below videos:

faqs.question: When does TNOU conducts entrance exam for B.Ed Special Education?
faqs.answer: Tamil Nadu Open University selects candidates for B.Ed Special Education based on entrance exam score. The university conducts the entrance exam inJanuary.Below are the tentative dates for TNOU entrance exam:EventDateDate of entrance examLast week of Jan of the admission yearAnnouncement of Entrance Examination Results Cut-offmarksLast week of Jan of the admission year

faqs.question: When do admissions begin for various courses at Tamil Nadu Open University?
faqs.answer: Admissions are conducted twice between January and June. Admission to the courses is primarily merit-based. Moreover, the admission process is completely online. Hence, candidates can fill out and submit the application form via online mode through the Tamil Nadu Open University official website (tnou. ac.in). In addition, the university has set up 12 regional centres throughout Tamil Nadu to assist students in the application process.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by St. Peter's CollegeReviewed on 10 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2024 and every good infrastructure
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are well-rounded and equipped with good basic equipment. I can easily use the facilities, and all the classrooms have air conditioning, with large blackboards. The Wi-Fi in the dorms is not quite good, but the library is a great alternative.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by St. Peter's CollegeReviewed on 23 Jan 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good College with best facilities.
reviews.review_text: The department is well-equipped with quality labs. Smart classrooms are there. In hostels, rooms are given on a shared basis with the facility of Wi-Fi. There is also a mess and a canteen for Vegetarian and non vegetarian food. A medical facility is also there in emergency times.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by St. Peter's CollegeReviewed on 25 Dec 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Recruiting companies are more valuable in college.

college_info.intro:
Patanjali University comprises 10 departments, including Yoga Science, Physical Education & Sports, Psychology, Sanskrit, History, and others. The university offers a wide range of courses at the UG and PG courses. BSc, BNYS, and UG Diploma are among the most popular programmes offered at the university. Patanjali University Haridwar offers three-year BSc programmes across various specialisations. Some of the popular BSc specialisations offered at the university are listed below:

faqs.question: What is the placement scenario of Patanjali University?

faqs.answer: A:    Patanjali University is yet to release the official placement data for BA courses. In the meantime, students can take a look at the NIRF report 2023. According to the report, the median package secured by UG 3-year during the placement drive held in 2022 was INR 3 LPA. faqs.question: How good are the BA placements at Patanjali University?

faqs.answer: A:    Student reviews present on Shiksha provide an outlook on the University of Patanjali's placement scenario for BSc courses. According to the reviews, around 60% of students get placed from the BSc department. Moreover, the average package generally offered to these students ranges from INR 5 to 7 LPA. Apart from this, as per NIRF 2023, the median package secured by UG 3-year during 2022 was INR 3 LPA.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: The University of Patanjali offers nine full-time courses at UG, PG, diploma, certificate and doctoral levels. The UG courses, including BA, BSc and BPES are of three-year duration, spread in a semester pattern. At the postgraduate level, the University of Patanjali offers two courses, namely MA and MSc in full-time mode. Both the courses are of two-year duration, comprising four semesters. In addition to these courses, the University of Patanjali offers three additional courses, namely PG Diploma, Diploma and Certificate courses. The certificate courses are of one-year duration. At the research level, the University of Patanjali offers a five-year PhD programme in multiple specialisations. Given below is an overview of University of Patanjali courses along with eligibility requirements and total fees:

faqs.answer: A:    The admission process for Patanjali University BA begins with the eligibility check. As per the official brochure for 2025, to be eligible for the course, students must have passed the Class 12 examination from a recognised board and obtained a minimum of 60% marks. Other than this, students must not be more than 25 years of age.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BA at Patanjali University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, students can pursue a BSc program from Patanjali University. It is an undergraduate course offered in full-time mode. Moreover, the PU BSc course is offered with three specialisations, namely, Yoga Science, Biological Science, and Microbiology. Admissions are granted based on fulfilment of eligibility and selection criteria. Other than BSc, the university also offers BSc Hons courses.
faqs.question: Can I do BSc from Patanjali University?

faqs.answer: A:    Hello Nishar Ahmed, this Bachelor of naturopathy and yogik Science or BNYS course runs for about 66 months and total tuition fees is approximately 11 Lakhs. I am attaching a link that will give you all the required and much more information about this course so that you can take an informed decision.https://www.shiksha.com/university/university-of-patanjali-haridwar-49319/courses/bnys-bcBest wishes to you.
faqs.question: What are the fees for BNYS programmes at the University of Patanjali?

faqs.answer: A:    In Patanjali University, Application, prospectus and registration fees once paid will not be refunded once the payment is done. Further, the university refund caution fee deposit. Additionally, convenience fee & taxes charged would not be refunded/ reversed for any refund or reversal of any transaction.
