reviews_list.review_title: Review of University of Patanjali.

review_content.Placements: To study at this university, students need to score at least 60% in classes 10 and 12. Upon graduation, they receive a degree from Patanjali, which holds significant value and can help them secure a job with a salary of around Rs. 50,000 per month. Students may also get a job at the university as an assistant professor or yoga instructor.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus provides facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, and science labs. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with microphones and smart boards. The hostel offers a medical room, an open gym, and a mega store for snacks.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc in Yoga Science - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is great. If you decide to join, it will be the best decision you make.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students from our course are placed. The average package is INR 25,000 per month, while placements abroad can offer up to INR 2 lakh per month, which is the highest salary in this field. Top recruiting companies include Cultfit and Surva. The college offers 100% internship facilities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college offers excellent facilities, including smart classrooms and Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The food quality is good, with healthy options provided in the mess. Free medical facilities are available, and there is a large sports ground with trainers for various sports.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fees for BNYS programmes at the University of Patanjali?
overview_faqs.answer: Hello Nishar Ahmed, this Bachelor of naturopathy and yogik Science or BNYS course runs for about 66 months and total tuition fees is approximately 11 Lakhs. I am attaching a link that will give you all the required and much more information about this course so that you can take an informed decision.https://www.shiksha.com/university/university-of-patanjali-haridwar-49319/courses/bnys-bcBest wishes to you.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules of Patanjali University?
overview_faqs.answer: In Patanjali University, Application, prospectus and registration fees once paid will not be refunded once the payment is done. Further, the university refund caution fee deposit. Additionally, convenience fee & taxes charged would not be refunded/ reversed for any refund or reversal of any transaction.

overview_faqs.question: Is there any online fee payment portal at Patanjali University?
overview_faqs.answer: No, Patanjali University doesn't have a separate fee payment portal. To submit any fee, candidates are required to visit Patanjali University campus directly or pay the fee directly to the bank account of university. To get the bank-related details candidates are required to visit the official website of the university.

overview_faqs.question: How much does BA at Patanjali University cost?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee structure of Patanjali University BA courses comprises multiple fee elements. The major two components are tuition fees and hostel fees. Other than this, the university also charges a one-time admission fee. Combining all, the total fees to pursue the BA programme range from INR 1.43 Lacs to INR 2.96 lakh. To know more, students can check out the below table:Fee ComponentsAmountTuition FeesINR 66,000 - INR 72,000Hostel FeesINR 72,000 - INR 2.16 lakhOne-time PaymentINR 5,000 - INR 8,500Total FeesINR 1.43 Lacs - INR 2.96 lakhNote: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

review_summary.college_name: Patanjali University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Physical Education and Sports (BPES) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It's the best place to build a healthy career and life.

content.Placements: We were offered opportunities in the field of physical education and sports, as well as in yoga, during and after the completion of the course. We were provided placements in the field of yoga in their branch of Patanjali and were given many options like a yoga trainer, ayurvedic treatment, etc.
content.Infrastructure: During my whole life, I visited many universities, schools, and colleges for sports tournaments and all. But I had never seen the kind of facilities they provided. This university provided the excellent and clean hostels I had ever seen, and the quality of food was also top. They maintained healthy and hygienic food.

individual_reviews.course: PG Diploma in Yoga Science - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The university infrastructure and faculty are very good.

content.Placements: None of the students from our batch got placed because, since the COVID era, there have been no placements happening at Patanjali University. The college management is informing that companies will come to the university for placements for the batch of 2025.
content.Infrastructure: The university does not have any Wi-Fi facility. While the university has a library, carrying phones into the library is not allowed, which is why there is no Wi-Fi there either. Only BPES students are provided with sports equipment in the university. The university has a mess facility where excellent food is served. Different types of nutritious dishes are prepared on all seven days of the week.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Yoga Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of University of Patanjali.

content.Placements: To study at this university, students need to score at least 60% in classes 10 and 12. Upon graduation, they receive a degree from Patanjali, which holds significant value and can help them secure a job with a salary of around Rs. 50,000 per month. Students may also get a job at the university as an assistant professor or yoga instructor.
content.Infrastructure: The campus provides facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, and science labs. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with microphones and smart boards. The hostel offers a medical room, an open gym, and a mega store for snacks.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Yoga Science - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Everything is great. If you decide to join, it will be the best decision you make.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students from our course are placed. The average package is INR 25,000 per month, while placements abroad can offer up to INR 2 lakh per month, which is the highest salary in this field. Top recruiting companies include Cultfit and Surva. The college offers 100% internship facilities.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers excellent facilities, including smart classrooms and Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The food quality is good, with healthy options provided in the mess. Free medical facilities are available, and there is a large sports ground with trainers for various sports.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Physical Education and Sports (BPES) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: University of Patanjali is one of the best option for you.

content.Placements: Approximately 70% of the students get the placements but if someone does not want to do the job, they can reject the placement job as well. And there are a number of companies that come to choose the best according to their needs each and every year. And Baba Ramdev is also taking a few students who are extremely talented.
content.Infrastructure: There are specialized grounds, a multipurpose hall for basketball and handball, and an all-synthetic handball badminton court. And many more courts are offered. There are each and every game. And the hostel is also there and it's above average .

placement_data.title: Patanjali University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: University of Patanjali placements 2023 is not released. However, according to Patanjali University NIRF report 2023, the median package offered to UG 3-year and PG 2-year during Patanjali University placements 2022 stood at INR 3.00 LPA . Further, the top recruiters during Patanjali University placements in the recent past included companies such as Cult -Fit Healthcare Private Limited, Gyanish Fitness Private Limited, and Patanjali Research Foundation.

tables.context: What is the placement scenario of Patanjali Univer

faqs.question: What is the placement scenario of Patanjali University?
faqs.answer: According to the official website , Patanjali University offers 100% placement assistance to its students. Further, students of Patanjali University are not only placed in reputed institutes as Yoga instructors but also have found jobs in corporate sectors. Apart from this, Patanjali University students have also started their own Yoga Startup companies. According to Patanjali University NIRF report 2023, the key highlights of Patanjali University placements 2022 are presented below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Total students (UG 3-year) 160 Students placed (UG 3-year) 22 Median package (UG 3-year) INR 3.00 LPA Total students (PG 2-year) 109 Students placed (PG 2-year) 13 Median package (PG 2-year) INR 3.00 LPA

faqs.question: How are BSc placements at Patanjali University?
faqs.answer: Student reviews present on Shiksha provide an outlook on the University of Patanjali's placement scenario for BSc courses. According to the reviews, around 60% of students get placed from the BSc department. Moreover, the average package generally offered to these students ranges from INR 5 to 7 LPA . Apart from this, as per NIRF 2023, the median package secured by UG 3-year during 2022 was INR 3 LPA .

faqs.question: How good are the BA placements at Patanjali University?
faqs.answer: Patanjali University is yet to release the official placement data for BA courses. In the meantime, students can take a look at the NIRF report 2023. According to the report, the median package secured by UG 3-year during the placement drive held in 2022 was INR 3 LPA . Other than this, as per the report, the total number of students placed during the same placement drive was 22.

hostel_campus.college_name: Patanjali University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Bhavya PG: Bhavya PG is a popular PG located just a few minutes walk from the university. The PG offers a variety of facilities, including shared and private rooms, laundry

reviews.review_heading: It's the best place to build a healthy career and life.
reviews.review_text: During my whole life, I visited many universities, schools, and colleges for sports tournaments and all. But I had never seen the kind of facilities they provided. This university provided the excellent and clean hostels I had ever seen, and the quality of food was also top. They maintained healthy and hygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: The university infrastructure and faculty are very good.
reviews.review_text: The university does not have any Wi-Fi facility. While the university has a library, carrying phones into the library is not allowed, which is why there is no Wi-Fi there either. Only BPES students are provided with sports equipment in the university. The university has a mess facility where excellent food is served. Different types of nutritious dishes are prepared on all seven days of the week.

reviews.review_heading: Review of University of Patanjali.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, and science labs. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with microphones and smart boards. The hostel offers a medical room, an open gym, and a mega store for snacks.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is great. If you decide to join, it will be the best decision you make.
reviews.review_text: The college offers excellent facilities, including smart classrooms and Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The food quality is good, with healthy options provided in the mess. Free medical facilities are available, and there is a large sports ground with trainers for various sports.

reviews.review_heading: University of Patanjali is one of the best option for you.
reviews.review_text: There are specialized grounds, a multipurpose hall for basketball and handball, and an all-synthetic handball badminton court. And many more courts are offered. There are each and every game. And the hostel is also there and it's above average .

reviews.review_heading: A very well maintained campus .
reviews.review_text:
We have Wi-Fi in hostels,  classrooms, library and computer rooms.
We have science and computer labs. 
We have classrooms for very large classes every year separately and spacious classes with a smart TV and a projector. 
And a library with every kind of book. 
The hostels are neat, clean and hygienic. 
The food is very good here, with a three-time meal and proper food. 
We have a medical room in our hostel with an MBBS doctor. 
We have four to five sports grounds, and we can issue sports items ...

reviews.review_heading: Know everything about Patanjali.
reviews.review_text:
1. When my hostel and academic fees are combined, we get lots of facilities for a smaller amount. They provide us with Wi-Fi, have a computer lab, two libraries with sufficient amounts of books, and big classrooms with digital boards in the classroom. The whole university has a positive vibe.
2. The mess is near the hostel. The hostel is compulsory for all the students. We get the best food as compared to other hostel food. The food is without onion and garlic. Medical care is available and ther...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for studies, and it gives you a simple life and inner peace.
reviews.review_text: The hostel building is very good, and also the mess services are good. The study environment is good. The food quality is good. Sports facilities are not okay.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities with good placements.
reviews.review_text:
1. Classrooms, practical labs, OPD, IPD, Library, research institute with dissection room, conference hall, yoga classes, Canteen, megastore, cafeteria are available.
2. Cleanliness,  24 hours electricity and water, RO facility, good quality food, all medical facilities provided with emergency services, annual function with annual sports meet but no regular sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with studies.
reviews.review_text: Campus with no Wi-Fi. Labs are good to work in and have much defined and modern techniques fo research and good faculty members to guide on. Classrooms are averagely infrastructure with fans and less exhaust. Projectors are there for PPT classes. Library is average with less hour availability.

reviews.review_heading: Come and have a look of University of Patanjali.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi labs, our classes are recently conducting in the building of Patanjali Ayurveda College. Our University building is under construction. Classrooms are not sufficient for the number of students available. We don't have computer and chemistry labs. Food doesn't contain onion and garlic, normally food is good but it has lots of oil and spice content in it by which many students fall ill. Hostel rooms are also a real issue here in 3 setters,  4 students are forced to stay and in 4 setter 5 ...

reviews.review_heading: Good college and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The university is roughly 35 acres. It features modern classrooms, research labs, a large auditorium, a rich library, and separate hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. The classrooms are very nice, and the college has a library. Facilities include breakfast at 8 o’clock in the morning, lunch at 1 o’clock in the afternoon, and dinner at 7 o’clock in the evening. Each hostel room has 3 beds, and a maximum of 3 students stay in one room.

reviews.review_heading: Yoga and Ayurveda Patanjali College is a premier institution in yoga and ayurveda.
reviews.review_text: The food served is completely satvik. The quality of the facilities is nice at our college. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is incredible. Medical facilities, sports, and games are wonderful. The facilities and infrastructure available for our course/department, like smart classrooms, labs, Wi-Fi, and a library, are all very good.

In Patanjali University, Application, prospectus and registration fees once paid will not be refunded once the payment is done. The Patanjali University's fee refund policy states that if students wish to withdraw their admission at the university, they can avail a refund of their submitted fees. The percentage of the fee refund is based on the point in time at which the withdrawal request is submitted.

individual_reviews.title: Ahmedabad physiotherapy college review.

content.Placements: This college is well known in India. The packages offered here are good, and the college has proper tie-ups with companies for internships, so students do not need to find jobs by themselves. In the Physiotherapy course, there are around 80 to 100 students in one batch.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a hostel for girls on campus, with Wi-Fi, a big mess, and a canteen for students. Classrooms are not very big or high-tech. The food tastes nice but is sweet. Hostel rooms are a little congested. They have AC and non-AC facilities. There is Wi-Fi in the college as well.

Tor recruiting companies were main channel automobile sector like Mahindra, Tata, Bosch, Honda, Toyota, etc. Automobile technician, marketing jobs, adviser, etc., were the top roles offered in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was enabled on campus, air conditioning classrooms were provided. It also provides dedicated workshops and proper practical. review_summary.college_name: George Telegraph College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Very good and well-maintained college.

content.Placements: There are very good students, and the placements are so high. Our students got placed in companies Tata, Honda, etc. Many of our students get placed, and they are working now. It motivates us. They also help us solve our doubts. They are also friendly with us.
content.Infrastructure: Classroom and library are so clean and well-maintained. The canteen food is not bad. College campus is so clean. The washrooms and classes are also very clean.
content.Faculty: The exam is online based in our course. The students are so good. We help each other. We provide notes to help each other. If I talk about the exam, then the exam is little bit tough but it's okay for students. The teachers also help us clear doubts. Teachers are so polite with students. They are so friendly. Teachers are so good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Hardware and Advanced Network Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: George Telegraph is best for studying. The placement ratio of this institute is too good.

content.Placements: Above 50% percentage of students were placed in this course. The highest package is 99,000/-, and the lowest package is 30,000/-. I got a job in Cadtrands Infotech and worked there for three years. I don't know, but I got 78% and joined an IT company. The top roles I got from this course were as a Technical Support Engineer, Desktop Support Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is available there. The best quality labs and classrooms are available there. But there is no Wi-Fi for students, and they also don’t have a library. I gave them a five-star quality rating for food, canteen, and sports games. They don’t have medical facilities.

content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was enabled on campus, air conditioning classrooms were provided. It also provides dedicated workshops and proper practical. The infrastructure was well maintained. Front office behavior was professional, college situated in the main bazaar of Sealdah. There were a lot of food stalls and canteen food was also cost-effective and good.
